name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: Save the U.S. Postal Service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
The Postal Service isn't something we can afford to lose, even in the digital age.
|
---
| | Derek --

The U.S. Postal Service is in trouble.

This vital service is in dire financial straits, but President Trump has said he'll block emergency funding to keep the postal service from going bankrupt during this pandemic.

The Postal Service isn't something we can afford to lose, even in the digital age. It processes 182 million pieces of first-class mail **every day.** A lot of those pieces of mail are medication, bills, bill payments, and other important documents.

Plus, during this time of unprecedented physical distancing, the postal system is providing a vital service to thousands of Americans who want to stay in touch with loved ones. Come November, many more Americans may want to utilize this system to cast their ballots by mail.

**Without Congressional action, there 's a real possibility that our postal system will cease to exist. [Will you sign our joint petition and show your support for the U.S. Postal Service?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d488/53d9897e/54e1cf1f/1c88757d/267271065/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?code=Warner&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-usps%23")**

Saving the Postal Service does more than keep us connected -- it keeps people employed. The U.S. Postal Service employs 600,000 folks across the country, and now their employment hangs in the balance. These hardworking people could lose their jobs unless Congress acts quickly to help the postal service.

**[Sign on to let the Trump administration know you want to save the U.S. Postal Service.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d488/53d9897e/54e1cf1f/1c88757d/267271065/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/SavetheUSPostalService/?code=Warner&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-usps%23")**

Thank you for your support,

-- Team Warner

| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d488/53d9897e/54e1cf1f/1c88757c/267271065/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200518_p_1_fl__582__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d488/53d9897e/54e1cf1f/1c88757b/267271065/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Mike Franken
subject: About to go on stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I'm about to step to the debate stage. I think I'm ready to present my case to Iowans, and I know once they hear and see the essence of our campaign, they're going to join the Franken Crew.
|
---

| | Hello to The Franken Crew! I'm about to step to the debate stage. I think I'm ready to present my case to Iowans, and I know once they hear and see the essence of our campaign, they're going to join the Franken Crew. If your schedule permits, please watch tonight's debate -- it will be a rewarding step towards what will be a pivotal election this fall. At stake is our future. So here's the link to the live stream: [_https://www.iowapublicradio.org/post/watch_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f254f/33365068/4a7f9246/3f8bc550/1142787306/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://www.iowapublicradio.org/post/watch-iowa-pbs-us-senate-democratic-primary-debate-tonight-8-pm#stream/0") Let's go! -mtf PS: You can also use this link to chip in and help us get the word out: _[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_debate](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f254f/33365068/4a7f9246/3f8bc551/1142787306/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q2?refcode=FRA_20200518_em_org_debate2_all_l1")_ (Sent from my Samsung Galaxy Smartphone)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: What is Pelosi REALLY up to?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
What she doesn't want you to see... No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-pqilik-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pqilik-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,Nancy Pelosi's $3 trillion wish list in Congress is so insane, it has more parts about marijuana (68) than it does about **JOBS** (52).This, at a time when 36 million have lost their jobs in the past two months, and we've got the highest unemployment since the Great Depression.**The worst damage happens when nobody fights back.** We've seen that here in Wisconsin during the fight to rescue our economy. Today, that's why I need you to join me in bringing the fight to Congress, to STOP Nancy Pelosi's backward priorities! [Join The Fight - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pqilik-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join The Fight - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pqilik-ahkdjtlkr-j/) In case you've been too busy to read Pelosi's 1,800 page liberal shopping list, here's some of the very worst:
* Giving your tax money to people in the country illegally.
* Forcing taxpayer funding for abortion.
* Killing Voter ID laws, like the kind we passed in Wisconsin.
* A potential $41 billion bailout for Illinois - putting Wisconsin taxpayers on the hook for Illinois's decades of failure!

I'm proud to be leading the fight against government overreach and failed leadership here in Wisconsin. **Will you help me bring the fight to Washington?** Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S., Will you help me? Join my campaign to fight back **against Nancy Pelosi's liberal wish list****** with a contribution of [$5, $10, $25, or even $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-pqilik-ahkdjtlkr-t/)! Thanks - Fitz

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas=20for=20Texas=20House?=
subject: Campaign Update
body:
Social distancing may be keeping us off the campaign trail, but I've enjoyed staying busy with my campaign through a variety of platforms | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/willdouglasfortexas/campaign-update-may-18-2020?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=8f36ae1a76&e=4f010155df)
---
| | Friends,

Social distancing may be keeping us off the campaign trail, but I've enjoyed staying busy with my campaign through a variety of platforms - whether it be Facebook Lives, Zoom Meet-Ups, social media posts, or direct phone calls to voters.

As the state continues to reopen, I'm excited to return to normal and get back to meeting folks in person!

In fact, tomorrow I'll be attending our first in-person political event in months. The Park Cities Republican Women will be hosting a meeting Tuesday night and I'd love to see you there! Please reach out to me for details.

And keep your eyes on your inbox — we will be sharing our first campaign video ad later this week. You definitely don’t want to miss out on this, I really like how it came out and hope you will too.

See below for a recap of what we've been up to lately...
---
|
---
|
---
It's been an honor to donate hand sanitizer to so many terrific first responders across Dallas County over the past couple months. Our police officers and firefighters are doing a tremendous job during these trying times and I'm so proud to lend a small part to help them out. This past week I dropped by the Sunnyvale Fire Station and the Mesquite Police Department.
|
---
|
---
This past Saturday morning I participated in a Zoom call with Beth Van Duyne, Rep. Matt Krause, and Chairman James Dickey. We were joined by nearly 100 volunteers who were fired up for a full day of making phone calls and registering voters. Volunteer work like this in May is how we win in November!
|
---
| [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=c8765f00cf&e=4f010155df)
---
Right after speaking to the volunteers on the Zoom call at 9:30am, I hopped on to another Zoom interview with Carl Pankratz, the former Deputy Mayor Pro Tem for the City of Rowlett at 10am. We had a terrific 50 minute conversation and if you'd like to watch part of it, simply click through.
|
---
| _**News Updates on COVID-19**_
* **Global:**[Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=a8dcc195ea&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 7pm: 4,786,672 \-- Total deaths: 317,695.
* **U.S.:** [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d8a491492d&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 7pm: 1,506,732 \-- Total deaths: 90,236.
* **Texas** : [Total](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=be0b7540d0&e=4f010155df) confirmed cases as of 7pm: 48,693 \-- Total deaths: 1,347.
* **Wall Street update:** The stock market [had its best day](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2887f053e0&e=4f010155df) since early April, driven by positive news of Moderna's phase one coronavirus vaccine trial.
* **Texas government update:** As Governor Abbott [moves us](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=741ce7ad7b&e=4f010155df) into Phase 2 of opening business, we have the lowest number of COVID-19 deaths since early April and yesterday we had the lowest COVID hospitalizations since mid April.

---
|
---
| _**Volunteer from Home**_
---
| Now you can volunteer for the Will Douglas for State House campaign from the comfort of your own home! We're seeking volunteers to help us make phone calls throughout the district, letting folks know about our campaign. If you'd like to volunteer, please call or text Trevor Naglieri at 508-826-5135.
---
|
---
| _**Join Team Will Douglas**_
---
| I'm a self-made pharmacy owner running for office to ensure the next generation of Texans can live in a state where the economy is strong and our communities are safe. This district has been ranked the top Republican take back opportunity in the state, which means every dollar we raise moves the needle toward returning HD-113 to Republicans. [Click here to donate](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=f11eeb0917&e=4f010155df) directly to our campaign. Then follow us on Facebook and Twitter at the links below, and like and share our content!
---
| For Texas,
Will Douglas
Republican Nominee for TX-HD-113
---
|
---
| [CONTRIBUTE](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=96ff7c0c6f&e=4f010155df "CONTRIBUTE")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0c78d6ae17&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=af2309dbf4&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=3912c98eb9&e=4f010155df)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2020 Will Douglas for Texas, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Will Douglas for TexasPO Box 496955Garland, TX 75049-6955
[Add us to your address book](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=0b66be983a&e=4f010155df&c=732b2b9354).

name: The Franken Crew
subject: Mike crushed it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Admiral Mike has the leadership experience we need for our next senator, and he knows what Iowans want from the federal government:
|
---
| |
---

| | **What a debate night, crew!** **The Admiral showed us exactly why he 's ready to be our next senator. But he needs your help. [_So, let 's keep our momentum rolling -- chip in today >> _](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f254d/33365068/4a7e3ee9/3f8bc4ea/917211499/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200518_em_fr_debate3_all_L1")** Admiral Mike has the leadership experience we need for our next senator, and he knows what Iowans want from the federal government:
* **Every American deserves quality healthcare** \-- _the same quality the Admiral received while serving in the Navy._
* **Our farmers need action on trade, not Tweets** \-- _The Admiral has the real experience to bring strength to the table, not strong Twitter fingers._
* **We need to take on the climate crisis head-on.**_Our farmers, our suffering, and therefore our economy is suffering, and man-made climate change bears an outsized share of the responsibility._

We're pushing every day to get Mike to Washington -- and push for our shared ideals. But, the first thing we need to do is win on June 2nd -- and we need your help to get there. [_**Can you chip in right now, with just 15 days until Election Day, every dollar counts.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f254d/33365068/4a7e3ee9/3f8bc4eb/917211499/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?refcode=FRA_20200518_em_fr_debate3_all_L2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f254d/33365068/4a7e3ee9/3f8bc4e4/917211499/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_ad?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=FRA_20200518_em_fr_debate3_all_abx5")

Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Dr. Manny Sethi
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 5/18
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved
body:
[](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-y/)
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friends, I'm thrilled we are back on the road! It's been a great week being back on our big orange bus, traveling the state, and meeting so many of you. In my first week back on the road, I visited Jackson, Clay, Overton, Hardin, Decatur, and Perry Counties. Many folks are still understandably anxious about COVID-19 and its potential spread. While I am traveling the state, we will be doing so wisely, and maintain social distancing protocols. Even as our campaign picks back up again, if you have any questions or I can help in any way, please feel free to email me directly at [manny@drmannyforsenate.com](http://manny@drmannyforsenate.com). **News: ** This past week, I announced we are embarking on a 95 County Tour of our great state. I've been traveling across all of Tennessee for the past year and I can't wait to travel acrosss all 95 counties again this summer. Keep an eye on our [Facebook page](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-j/) and [drmannyforsenate.com](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-t/) to see when we will be coming to your city! Read our releases from the _[Tennessee Star](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-i/) _and _[TNJ: On the Hill](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-d/)._ Many Tennesseans are in desperate need of work. We can bring an industrial revolution to our state AND uncouple ourselves from the Communist Chinese government by producing our own PPE right here in Tennessee, especially in our Economic Opportunity Zones. [Read my full plan here!](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-h/) **Social Media:** [](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-k/) [As I toured Savannah on Thursday I talked to many folks who are anxious to get our economy up and running again](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-u/). We can bring a new industrial revolution to Tennessee simply by manufacturing our own PPE. We as a country need to end our reliance on the Communist Chinese government for our medical supplies. As your next US Senator, I will fight to make sure Tennessee can lead this movement. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-o/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-b/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-n/) to keep up with all that we are doing during this pandemic. We aren't slowing this campaign down as we work towards victory in August! **COVID-19 Resources:** There are many resources at your disposal. I urge you to order take-out, donate blood, wear a mask even if you are feeling fine, and above all, pray for our country during this time. Also please continue to adhere to the guidelines being put forth by [President Trump](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-p/), [Governor Lee](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-x/), and [the CDC](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-m/), even as the economy gets up and running again. I can't wait to get back out to every corner of Tennessee in our big orange bus and continue meeting you all. I believe Tennesseans should meet their next US Senator. Stay safe out there. I'm praying for all of you! Dr. Manny P.S. There are 80 days until Election Day! A donation right now will help me reach the US Senate and be a true representative of YOU, instead of a Washington insider. [DoNATe herE](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-jkniug-olhhkyhhid-c/) Copyright © 2019 Paid for by Dr. Manny for Senate, All rights reserved.
Our mailing address is:
PO Box 58068, Nashville, TN 37205 |

name: Steve Chabot
subject: ICYMI China Op-Ed on Fox News
body:
See below my latest op-ed on FoxNews.com about holding China accountable for their dishonesty and mismanagement around the coronavirus crisis. The cor
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-r/)
# ICYMI: China Op-Ed on FoxNews
Friend,See below my latest op-ed on FoxNews.com about holding China accountable for their dishonesty and mismanagement around the coronavirus crisis. The coronavirus crisis has underscored two facts: the Chinese Communist Party is a bad actor on the world stage and our nation is far too economically dependent on China. The op-ed is below or you can [click](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-y/) to read at FoxNews.com. **[If you support my stand to hold China accountable please give $10, $25, $50, or more to my campaign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-j/)**[**.**](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-t/)
### **_Coronavirus death toll - recognize this simple truth about China, and act accordingly_**, Steve Chabot, May 18, 2020
To date, it's estimated that more than 85,000 Americans have died from the coronavirus. We owe it to these Americans to let the pandemic also kill the last vestiges of the notion that China is our friend.Since the 1970s, Washington and Wall Street have believed that giving China a stake in the international system would lead to a China that respected the rule of law and was moving toward democracy. While many foreign policy experts pursued this counterfactual pipedream, Beijing was building its economy on the backs of American workers, developing a world-class military, and seeking in countless other ways to displace the United States as the dominant power in Asia.The coronavirus starkly demonstrates just how wrong this theory was.Let's face facts. Senior Chinese Communist Party (CCP) leadership knew about the coronavirus - knew that left unchecked it would become a global pandemic - and had enough evidence to suspect human-to-human transmission was possible well before they let the world know.Moreover, Beijing's failures to halt international travel out of Wuhan created a pandemic that has infected 4.5 million people across the globe. And as time goes on, we keep learning that the CCP knew more, and earlier, about the virus, and they hid that knowledge from the rest of the world.Of course warning the world would have hurt China's reputation and slowed its economic growth, the prime source of CCP legitimacy. But this is the world the CCP wants to live in - a world where its interests overrule any concerns about human life or international obligations.While our national security establishment has woken up over the past few years, the coronavirus highlights just how much the economy is still blind to these facts. We are far too dependent on China, and our critical supply chains are thoroughly entangled with its economy.Before the pandemic, there were growing alarms about dependence on China. In 2018, a Department of Defense report found the U.S. military was becoming dangerously dependent on China for critical components and hardware. And as recent trade tensions show, this dependence extends to many sectors of the U.S. economy.The current pandemic, however, has brought into sharp, ugly focus just how dependent we are. With headlines blaring that we rely on China for personal protective equipment and pharmaceuticals (often substandard), the American people are realizing firsthand just what dependence truly means.All rich economies are trading economies. That said, many benefits of trade go missing if one side - in this case, China - is a perpetual cheater.For decades, the CCP has prevented American companies from fairly competing in China. They have stolen our intellectual property worth trillions of dollars either through hacking, unfair rules or spying (yes, they have even tried to hack our coronavirus vaccine research). They bully airlines and the NBA when they don't follow the CCP party line on Taiwan or Hong Kong.And worse for American workers, the CCP has decimated our manufacturing sector through currency manipulation, dumping products like steel and aluminum, and policies designed to corner the market on key industries. This has stolen untold sums from our economy and deprived middle- and working-class Americans from countless good-paying jobs.When President John F. Kennedy promised Americans that our nation would put a man on the moon by the end of the 1960s, he knew we could rely on supply chains in the free world. But imagine if, when he made that pledge, our rocket engines and rocket fuel depended on the Soviet Union. We are in an analogous position with China today.China is our number one strategic competitor. When it comes to supply chains, our economy hasn't behaved like it. Now more than ever, we owe it to all the Americans who have died from the CCP-turbocharged coronavirus, to change that. ## | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-i/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-h/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-u/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-o/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jknkrn-l-b)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jknkrn-961825B2-kujkulhluu-a) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jknkrn-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: MAY 21: deadline to apply to vote by mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
| | | |
---|---
| | For the first time in history, every single Hoosier voter can vote by mail. If you’re wondering how you can do it, we’ve got you covered. Here’s everything you need to know about voting by mail in the 2020 primary: **-Apply to vote by mail by May 21-** ******Your county clerk must have your application by May 21.** If they receive your application after May 21, even if it is postmarked before, it will not be counted. So, we suggest applying online or hand-delivering your form to your county clerk’s office. **There are three ways to apply to vote by mail:**
1. Fill out your application online at [indianavoters.in.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542874/198075311/-1499154792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)
2. Download the form to mail it in [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542875/198075312/1601583050?id=14529&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535).
3. Call the Election Division to request an application: (317) 232-3939

**You can check the status of your application** by visiting “[My Voter Portal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542876/198075313/629425687?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535)” on [indianavoters.in.gov](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542877/198075314/-1499154792?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). **Looking for step-by-step instructions on applying to vote by mail?** Check out our 30-second video on how to fill out a mail-in application [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542878/198075315/-803653937?v=MnqlsMN5nVM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). Or watch our video on how to fill out the online application [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542879/198075316/-803653937?v=HdZpyOfUoAs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). **-Apply to vote by mail by noon on June 2-** ******Your county clerk must have your ballot by June 2 at noon.** Anything postmarked before June 2, but received after June 2 at noon will not be counted. **To have your ballot counted,** you must sign the outer security envelope in the space provided. **-Additional Resources-** **For deadlines, instructions, and troubleshooting** on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot take a look at our [vote-by-mail flowchart](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17542880/198075317/773508790?type=3&theater&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGNhNDFkMi1iNjk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14ARyAXs-KgyCAxrlWVgSnzew6q27AOrxPqn5D-KPVw=&emci=0f1078a5-0d99-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=84ca41d2-b699-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=4925535). **¿Hablas español?** ¿Quieres votar por correo? clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | For the first time in history, every single Hoosier voter can vote by mail. If you’re wondering how you can do it, we’ve got you covered. Here’s everything you need to know about voting by mail in the 2020 primary: -Apply to vote by mail by May 21- ****Your county clerk must have your application by May 21. If they receive your application after May 21, even if it is postmarked before, it will not be counted. So, we suggest applying online or hand-delivering your form to your county clerk’s office. There are three ways to apply to vote by mail: 1. Fill out your application online at 2. Download the form to mail it in . 3. Call the Election Division to request an application: (317) 232-3939 You can check the status of your application by visiting “” on . Looking for step-by-step instructions on applying to vote by mail? Check out our 30-second video on how to fill out a mail-in application . Or watch our video on how to fill out the online application . -Apply to vote by mail by noon on June 2- ****Your county clerk must have your ballot by June 2 at noon. Anything postmarked before June 2, but received after June 2 at noon will not be counted. To have your ballot counted, you must sign the outer security envelope in the space provided. -Additional Resources- For deadlines, instructions, and troubleshooting on registering to vote, applying to vote by mail, and mailing in your ballot take a look at our . ¿Hablas español? ¿Quieres votar por correo? Tenemos un diagrama de instrucciones . Want to share this information? Check out our short . Still have questions? Call the Election Division at (317) 232-3939. name: Mike
subject: Associated Press: Sheriff switches endorsement in nasty GOP US House race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | Sheriff switches endorsement in nasty GOP US House race Associated Press Russell Contreras May 19, 2020 [https://apnews.com/25451606e3089fc9ae6ced02755124ba](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pLJzzaeKVuL2JLJAhbWU0ZCtsyPTNZH1pmJbaff4m_Jufofbmsp4zQAkBbrXI6L4nV2KxCmmLREcyupO4enLYuViz1YEhTp4lSTi1giNcu2DeU3w6-MykidG4ld74QeaNV-yNkrTkmw2U9oiulgVKf5Cb897iJ15Zr0Lvl3gNyoskESPSzTFMw==&c=zPqvl9lJue6wsnNdLIG-XyzeNFFXouv8IFc3bXDqT09dVDGuOY-pug==&ch=5xOFcmvvklcAjhffTeYSJ1n9w2AdnMIxVr0qZAhlEoXwbYKO0PGjIw==)

RIO RANCHO, N.M. (AP) -- An influential sheriff has switched his endorsement in an increasingly nasty Republican primary race for crucial U.S. House race in southern New Mexico.
Eddy County Sheriff Mark Cage said Monday he is throwing his support behind oil executive Claire Chase for the GOP nomination to challenge Democratic Rep. Xochitl Torres Small.
Cage initially has supported former state lawmaker Yvette Herrell for the nomination -- a move that Herrell advertised on her campaign's Facebook page. He later said he was staying neutral after Chase jumped in the race.
"Unfortunately, the latest very personal, very ugly attacks on my friend Claire Chase have driven me to do otherwise," Cage said in a video.
Herrell has faced [criticism](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pLJzzaeKVuL2JLJAhbWU0ZCtsyPTNZH1pmJbaff4m_Jufofbmsp4zQAkBbrXI6L4m01LHL2i9AVbBf2C4HUnwKlVsQ1NuA2Z9B719KDvWzVveUAoUHJNXv2jiP7ThJMOPeblb9-HY7Om3c7_Mi-18i8f4ZJPREsuvgAomcMdjYdIo1qGqQfAGFlVgcy_zBNMOSn6qOaRI-GD5dv-srSrX38rVc5Q7ph2flnc65yDDf7UVZgrlgSGBlBw-U5eFuY5QOHjZnGYSBcmSx3aCsvVVIsLuTht3KoI&c=zPqvl9lJue6wsnNdLIG-XyzeNFFXouv8IFc3bXDqT09dVDGuOY-pug==&ch=5xOFcmvvklcAjhffTeYSJ1n9w2AdnMIxVr0qZAhlEoXwbYKO0PGjIw==#BlogContent) for exchanging text messages with a cartoonist who was drafting a meme around false rumors Chase had cheated on her first husband. Text messages obtained by The Associated Press show Herrell offering suggestions to the meme. In a statement, Chase said she was excited to have Cage's support. A spokesman for Herrell's campaign did not immediately return a text message.
---

name: Ethan
subject: Rally for Fair Elections- Thursday, May 21 at 7 pm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
|
---
__Join us on Facebook Live Thursday at 7 pm for__ __**a Rally for Fair Elections**__ Hi Peter, The [Washington Post](https://act.myngp.com/el/lzaBWZr2iACG5meFXlMoJXNc9Jjf2fuUHcoWNLn1r74=/cgmOSK52t45RDRxENc5vZW__dbyhjiwn-nEZgykn1j8=) recently gave a stark assessment of Ohio's primary election stating that "Ohio's election was a mess. It would be a disaster at the national level." **Because of mass confusion in election dates and voting procedures, Ohio had near record low turnout among its voters.** With the White House, Statehouse, and future of Ohio's districts on the line in November, we cannot afford to let the inaction of our state legislature disenfranchise millions across the state. With gerrymandered congressional and statehouse districts, a small fringe group of Republicans has amassed _so much power, _while representing _so few _Ohioans, that they can take away power from those they disagree with, even within their own party. We have the opportunity to redraw the districts in 2021, which is why it's so important to elect Democrats to the state legislature this November. We must have more seats at the table to eliminate unfair districts-- like Jim Jordan's that stretches from Lorain county to Mercer and Champaign. Please join moderator Steve Dettelbach and panelists Kathleen Clyde and Betsy Rader via Facebook Live to discuss how we can make sure everyone's voice is heard in November and how we can get rid of gerrymandering in Ohio. We can't do it without you! _Kathleen Clyde is a Portage County Commissioner, who served four terms as an Ohio State Representative and was the Democratic candidate for Ohio Secretary of State in 2018. Steve Dettelbach was the Democratic candidate for Ohio Attorney General in 2018 and served as the U.S. Attorney for the Northern District of Ohio from 2009 to 2016._ **Please join us and spread the word about the _Rally for Fair Elections_ with Betsy Rader and Kathleen Clyde. clean_body: | Join us on Facebook Live Thursday at 7 pm for a Rally for Fair Elections Hi Peter, The = recently gave a stark assessment of Ohio's primary election stating that "Ohio's election was a mess. It would be a disaster at the national level." Because of mass confusion in election dates and voting procedures, Ohio had near record low turnout among its voters. With the White House, Statehouse, and future of Ohio's districts on the line in November, we cannot afford to let the inaction of our state legislature disenfranchise millions across the state. With gerrymandered congressional and statehouse districts, a small fringe group of Republicans has amassed so much power, while representing so few Ohioans, that they can take away power from those they disagree with, even within their own party. We have the opportunity to redraw the districts in 2021, which is why it's so important to elect Democrats to the state legislature this November. We must have more seats at the table to eliminate unfair districts-- like Jim Jordan's that stretches from Lorain county to Mercer and Champaign. Please join moderator Steve Dettelbach and panelists Kathleen Clyde and Betsy Rader via Facebook Live to discuss how we can make sure everyone's voice is heard in November and how we can get rid of gerrymandering in Ohio. We can't do it without you! Kathleen Clyde is a Portage County Commissioner, who served four terms as an Ohio State Representative and was the Democratic candidate for Ohio Secretary of State in 2018. Steve Dettelbach was the Democratic candidate for Ohio Attorney General in 2018 and served as the U.S. Attorney for the Northern District of Ohio from 2009 to 2016. | Derek Our strong New Hampshire grassroots support is not going unnoticed nationally! A few weeks ago we announced that [Governor Mike Huckabee has endorsed our campaign](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI0NTU2Njk0NzY3MTQ2MTE4JmM9ajNrMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDk0OTYwMjYmZD1rOWM5bTN5.DC-dgV_ps5eXgHdj9eSPU_KKG6QzowEHk72wWuz7QX8), then the NRCC named me a [Young Guns On the Radar candidate](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI0NTU2Njk0NzY3MTQ2MTE4JmM9ajNrMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDk0OTYwMjgmZD1tNGU2YjZr._usicv2zkrmxDJ9UpAMIC8A9zJq5rtNd_8V3x_mscGk), and now we have been endorsed by former Chairman of the House Committee on Homeland Security, [Congressman Pete King](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI0NTU2Njk0NzY3MTQ2MTE4JmM9ajNrMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDk0OTYwMzAmZD1iNGIwczh5.XG7VNDjyrtnT_RqGXlPKGLFKNQbS9mHzR1NAoSDf3uk)! **I am so proud that we are building our campaign the right way - starting by building our support on the ground here in New Hampshire and then _forcing_ Washington to take notice. ** ****My primary opponent is trying to do it the other way around - by spending money raised in Washington DC, New Jersey and New York City to try and convince voters that he "understands" New Hampshire. But, **what he doesn't realize is that New Hampshire voters are smart**. We know that this race isn't going to be won down in the Swamp, but up here talking directly to the voters one-on-one. That's why we had the strongest in-state fundraising quarter of _any_ candidate in the race.
Please help us defeat Chris Pappas this Fall by joining Team Mayberry for Congress and [chipping in $5, $15 or $25 today](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDI0NTU2Njk0NzY3MTQ2MTE4JmM9ajNrMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDk0OTYwMzImZD1zMWsxbTF1.c-Fyy_bE3X8HBr_a5jFzeQvMZBlKnwubgMxXVgJmryc)! Thank you, Matt

Peter, This is a quick follow-up. If you haven’t weighed in yet, I wanted to give you one final chance to respond. We’re going to close out this survey TONIGHT at 10:00 p.m.! _Which political issues are most important to you right now?_ _Do you approve of President Trump’s handling of the COVID-19 pandemic?_ _How do you rate our chances of defeating Doug Jones this November?_ **[Take just a moment to let us know what you think](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/205c65ce433e7571/c861d20c8c505255c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**. It will only take a minute or two to complete this survey. \- Paul [ View Survey & Respond >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/205c65ce433e7571/e815fb238aa46facc3d6b838967d376c/33013) | |

From: Team Tuberville
Date: Monday, April 27, 2020; 10:01 AM
To: All Supporters
Subject: Top issues + Trump response
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/205c65ce433e7571/a28b7093242ead58c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
Friends,

Coach wrote you the other day – did you see his message?

**We’ve launched a new issues survey, and we’re hoping that every supporter will take just a minute or two to respond!**

As we all practice social distancing, it’s important to Coach to continue hearing what’s on the minds of conservatives across Alabama.

**[>> Tap or click to view the survey & respond >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/205c65ce433e7571/87765edbe15bd563c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

This is a great opportunity to let Coach know which issues are on your mind during this challenging time, your opinion on President Trump’s response to the pandemic, and what you think about the outlook in this top 2020 U.S. Senate election.

Thank you if you’ve already responded to Coach’s previous email. If you haven’t had a chance to share your thoughts yet, please take a moment to do so now.

Coach is eager to hear from you!

\- Team Tuberville

clean_body: Peter, This is a quick follow-up. If you haven’t weighed in yet, I wanted to give you one final chance to respond. We’re going to close out this survey TONIGHT at 10:00 p.m.! Which political issues are most important to you right now? Do you approve of President Trump’s handling of the COVID-19 pandemic? How do you rate our chances of defeating Doug Jones this November? . It will only take a minute or two to complete this survey. \- Paul | | From: Team Tuberville Date: Monday, April 27, 2020; 10:01 AM To: All Supporters Subject: Top issues + Trump response Friends, Coach wrote you the other day – did you see his message? We’ve launched a new issues survey, and we’re hoping that every supporter will take just a minute or two to respond! As we all practice social distancing, it’s important to Coach to continue hearing what’s on the minds of conservatives across Alabama. This is a great opportunity to let Coach know which issues are on your mind during this challenging time, your opinion on President Trump’s response to the pandemic, and what you think about the outlook in this top 2020 U.S. Senate election. Coach is eager to hear from you! \- Team Tuberville id:2020-03-26-15:29:47:923t Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17549839/198223449/1521310305?refcode=em051920-header&refcode2=6835202c-f499-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM1MjAyYy1mNDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULsdAFiW8gsjZCGmHgiDM7vf3BiwjkXA27CSzUPdfH8=) **** | | Friend,

Yesterday morning I joined faith leaders from across Georgia by virtual press conference to support Teresa Tomlinson’s U.S. Senate campaign. With early voting now underway, I wanted to tell you why I and so many others are making the call to vote for Teresa in this June 9th primary election.

I’m a Teresa Tomlinson fan because of my wife, first of all. When Carolyn first told me that I was going to vote for Teresa, I was fascinated by her eight years as a mayor — the first woman ever to be elected in Columbus. Mayors know what it is to do everything, from picking up your garbage to having water to wash your face in the morning. I’ve had the honor of representing Georgia in Congress and the United States in the United Nations, and I can tell you that serving as mayor of Atlanta for eight years was the best job I had.

Then I met Teresa and heard her tell her story. She is an example of the fact that you can start anywhere and go everywhere in life if you work hard and devote yourself to others. Teresa’s integrity, strong moral and ethical character, and her devotion to serving others are the qualities that have resonated with me and leaders of faith across our state. From taking the underdog fights in federal litigation, to governing as a mayor, and continuing to stand up for justice and equality today, I believe that Teresa not only will be ready to serve us on Day One, but will do so with honor and distinction.

Friend, if you are able, I ask that you make a contribution to Teresa’s campaign today. This is the most important stretch of the election, and we need your help to get out the vote. Early voting and vote by mail are underway, and your contribution will help Teresa’s campaign reach these voters before June 9th: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tt2020-leadership](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17549840/198223450/1521310305?refcode=em051920-b&refcode2=6835202c-f499-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODM1MjAyYy1mNDk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ULsdAFiW8gsjZCGmHgiDM7vf3BiwjkXA27CSzUPdfH8=)**

By the grace of God, we will send Teresa to the Senate because she knows the path we’re trying to pave for all of God’s children. I want to personally thank Teresa for offering herself in service, and thank you, friend, for doing your part to win this election. God bless you.

Andrew Young
---

* * *

PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906

Then, their efforts began to pay off. Joe Biden LED President Trump in multiple polls of Texas voters.
But now? When national Dems are blaming Trump for the spread of COVID-19, imagine the damage that can be done.
They're going to double down.
That's why I'm focusing all of my energy on defending the president, and spreading the TRUTH that CHINA is to blame for misleading the world about COVID-19.
As we stand right now, I've only raised enough to contact 1% of Texas voters with my Pro-Trump message which they need desperately to hear.

Friend --

Incredible news: **Senator Elizabeth Warren has just _endorsed_ Georgette Gómez for Congress!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17550208/198235843/1147193815?refcode=em-200519-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViYjdhYS1mODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOUThZ0_F02eJrVc64IZIbqcd8fZBQnkMC4dIuGnkYw=) Now more than ever, we need experienced and ethical leaders who will help struggling families and rebuild America with bold new investments in people, public health and jobs. **Senator Warren knows that Georgette has the courage and conviction to fight for big, structural change in Congress.**

This is a game-changer, friend! And right now we need to build on this momentum:

**[Will you chip in a contribution of $3 to help us celebrate this HUGE endorsement? Just like Senator Warren, Georgette won’t take a dime from corporate PACs and we’re depending on grassroots support to bring progressive change to CA-53.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17550209/198235844/1147193815?refcode=em-200519-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmViYjdhYS1mODk5LWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rOUThZ0_F02eJrVc64IZIbqcd8fZBQnkMC4dIuGnkYw=)** **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200519-all-b)This endorsement is another reminder that Georgette is building a broad and truly historic coalition in this race. **Labor unions, environmental groups, the California Democratic Party, local elected leaders, and leading Democrats like Senator Warren are all unifying behind our campaign.

We’re humbled by the support, but we’re still up against our self-funding opponent’s millions as well as her personal super PAC.

_Because of her massive spending, our opponent was the top vote winner in the March primary election._ Overcoming that in November is going to require overwhelming grassroots energy.

body:
I am feeling so humbled and inspired by the outpouring of support I received on my birthday yesterday. In these difficult and uncertain times, it was energizing to hear from friends old and new. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/OtNzlTRaT92rhR_ZKwlbng/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKDvhIcBpMc2jBedVZSyARcxstj5V3U2d70clh-2BwXf5eTkIuXP3BuEFdmm8mqkgh6jUyPUdKKyBhW7-2BbYl8dZ55l3n0EaRvEnrrG5giG0thE-2B9C6AsdPdq63KAD3ZdjjrSoAcwJA-2Bw1MfKXdoZY5q86lmBV4MSd-2FB2r2vR-2FNY4SCBUPCDEA9DmmF-2F7jebVjpx2VRwWVnvFkIkbhWNM5DlFuncQVNqDWaTVzjTIjfDDzTts535XUGUJbEhBEa5V2SHc-3D/P4u5) Friend, **** **** **** I am feeling so humbled and inspired by the outpouring of support I received on my birthday yesterday. In these difficult and uncertain times, it was energizing to hear from friends old and new. I even snuck in a glass or two of Prosecco between campaign work.
We’re keeping the celebration going for one more day because today at 5pm EDT, we are hosting a fundraiser featuring one of my personal heroes, Rep. Ayanna Pressley. I have long admired Congresswoman Pressley, from my first year at Harvard Law School when she was a Boston City Councilmember who stood up for my classmates when they faced discrimination by a Boston nightclub. It is an honor to have her endorsement and to be joined by her later today.
**_[We still have tickets left, so if you haven’t done so already, I hope you’ll buy one now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/OtNzlTRaT92rhR_ZKwlbng/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKDvhIcBpMc2jBedVZSyARcCFT5-2FOx2f7J3x7QTRPTzek8mxp19DhRN-2FYxNmHuBIV5Y7tc7WZxiH6Na0RT-2FaioHk-2FQveVqZQcvfc-2BULMW6qQTXkookdyWafPwIJARalxjLCwoRWIzVdjL8JPHtCMV7zTEZWWle22IkN5hrPuPDVt0fxRkQYvluue1QTe9jXcMBYmJoLAlY7sXuQ4lJNjz2EFvXYC9MO1EF5Iod8Rf7IbMuv51B20L8STw3IBUOk7gw-3D/RQwD)_**
[Join us today >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/OtNzlTRaT92rhR_ZKwlbng/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKDvhIcBpMc2jBedVZSyARcfOs-2FeaMTpFInVw6Tp7M0cGVmKXNDmEp1JfegTTnA6gIe-2Byt9kFijLGie3H5OTJ9DIPAkCwNw6v2Ek5NzdJH3-2B7GbDphsOTgLw3uq3faLpB7sZeSofp6afyCFj-2FT-2FH0kzrAtL06Uf2zYc0e6aN5AhP586ksyz6jKZwNCJj41-2FWqwdmf5sxQFB34wNy-2BMwzA4zz-2BUaDOKkbPVvCZLMkyiqfxpwNz1hqqmadG1TYAc-2FxHY-3D/SVWB)
This fundraiser comes at a crucial time in the campaign. Yesterday, I spent my birthday finishing up the recordings for our campaign’s TV ads, which will soon air all across the district. With everyone at home right now, so many voters will learn about our campaign from our TV commercials and mailers. But these ads are incredibly expensive, and we need your help. **_[Please buy a ticket for our fundraiser to help us finish these last few weeks strong.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/OtNzlTRaT92rhR_ZKwlbng/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKDvhIcBpMc2jBedVZSyARcHhrPsV3dLfu-2BGxb-2BuDeKXXdV-2Bjr8-2Fh4WBFfdIBPGyq9G-2BzNV6I1rim2yFPIBjQo4fjR7CFpERQEoEeEpM1N6nUoyT0hVzTphuvILG1NHY0fMnfFLMzYI7CuGirewLB498tWCVd0db8AZFhFCShY2QgQIWQ6fTue22NGFSmLCPQdWobkj20XDmnB6tel-2BY-2Fkho61EFdhQ4zVB0-2FCmrQfIrpFEwC8FZdGnDyEfJlUlopU-3D/sTHN)_**
Thank you, Mondaire

We just got word, Peter:

**The runoff debate is taking place on JUNE 6. That's only two weeks away!**

There's no time to lose. We KNOW MJ is the one candidate who can defeat Sen. John Cornyn and flip the Senate, but she absolutely needs you with her -- November's election will be _neck and neck_.

That's why it's super important to have a strong show of support leading up to this debate, so we can power through the runoff and enter the general at full strength -- and **[you can help!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489007a/7f51f7bc/4e519290/4ef6b755/4087200989/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-oneof15?refcode=email_20200519.1nd_v1__1440__&amount=10")**

**Will you be one of the 15 donors we need from your area BEFORE MIDNIGHT? Help us show that this movement is MASSIVE and we're coming for Sen. Cornyn!**

body:
Maine. Arizona. North Carolina. Iowa. All of these Senate races have consistently been named as top-tier targets for Democrats to flip in November. But today, I want to talk to you specifically about how Cory Gardner in Colorado has made that list too.

**Maine. Arizona. North Carolina. Iowa.**

All of these Senate races have consistently been named as top-tier targets for Democrats to flip in November.

**But today, Friend, I want to talk to you specifically about how Cory Gardner in Colorado has made that list too.**

You see, Chuck Schumer knows just how important it is to win this battleground Senate race. It's so important to the far-Left to win that they've committed to spending _**tens of millions of dollars in Colorado.
**_
We can't sit back and allow the radical Left or any of its proponents in Washington to take the reins, especially now when practical, common-sense, conservative leadership is what's working.

So today, I'm calling on you, Friend, to fight for Cory just as he fights for Coloradans and Americans **_everywhere_**.

clean_body: Maine. Arizona. North Carolina. Iowa. All of these Senate races have consistently been named as top-tier targets for Democrats to flip in November. But today, I want to talk to you specifically about how Cory Gardner in Colorado has made that list too. Maine. Arizona. North Carolina. Iowa. All of these Senate races have consistently been named as top-tier targets for Democrats to flip in November. But today, Friend, I want to talk to you specifically about how Cory Gardner in Colorado has made that list too. You see, Chuck Schumer knows just how important it is to win this battleground Senate race. It's so important to the far-Left to win that they've committed to spending tens of millions of dollars in Colorado. We can't sit back and allow the radical Left or any of its proponents in Washington to take the reins, especially now when practical, common-sense, conservative leadership is what's working. So today, I'm calling on you, Friend, to fight for Cory just as he fights for Coloradans and Americans everywhere. == == == == == == == The fight to defend conservatives in 2020 is only just beginning. subject: You're invited! Virtual House Party with Dani Brzozowski and Paul Stoddard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
Join us on May 27th for a virtual house party to propel Dani and Paul to victory in November! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3c7c1deedb68/youre-invited-virtual-house-party-with-dani-brzozowski-and-paul-stoddard-3882473?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
We are thrilled to invite you to join **Paul Stoddard, Democratic nominee for State Representative in IL-70** and **Dani Brzozowski, Democratic nominee for Congress in IL-16** for a virtual fundraiser via Zoom on May 27th!

---
| [Grab your tickets here!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6694f860d8&e=140a9b81e7 "Grab your tickets here!")
---
| You will receive the information for the Zoom call the day before the event, and a reminder the day of. **Tickets are only $10, so you don't want to miss this event! **

You'll hear updates on the state of the race from both candidates, get to know them a bit better, and we'll have a question and answer session before we wrap up! The event will begin at 5 pm CST and will be hosted by Jim Leubke, Chair of the DeKalb County Democrats. Let's all "get together" to help send Paul to Springfield and Dani to Washington this November! Get your ticket at this link: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/paulanddani](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=3273e0e7a2&e=140a9b81e7)

Looking forward to seeing you there!

Team Dani
---
| [Click here to RSVP](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=2c18a1fd35&e=140a9b81e7 "Click here to RSVP")

Cutting taxes, confirming judges, and defending our constitutional rights, Mitch is getting real results for the people of Kentucky and our great nation.

As one of Mitch McConnell's most trusted supporters, we wanted to reach out to give you a snapshot of where this campaign stands heading into November.

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The Massive Trump Coronavirus Supply Effort that the Media Loves to Hate
body:
"There is a new cardinal rule in journalism—never write anything favorable about the Trump administration’s coronavirus response.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=854ad34d50&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The Massive Trump Coronavirus Supply Effort that the Media Loves to Hate**

“There is a new cardinal rule in journalism—never write anything favorable about the Trump administration’s coronavirus response, even about its successes,” Rich Lowry writes for _National Review_.

“It’s why the story of how the administration handled the potential ventilator crisis has gone almost entirely untold, and why its effort to secure supplies of personal protective equipment, or PPE, has been gotten largely skeptical or hostile coverage.”

After all, “this was not your average bureaucratic response,” Lowry says.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=253ed0e32d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “China is our number one strategic competitor. When it comes to supply chains, our economy hasn’t behaved like it. Now more than ever, we owe it to all the Americans who have died from the CCP-turbocharged coronavirus, to change that,” Rep. Steve Chabot (R-OH) writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=28657af56e&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Democrats and their puppets in the media—once fierce critics of US law enforcement and spying agencies—have suddenly become their biggest champions, at least when the issue is these agencies’ targeting of Team Trump.” There’s mounting evidence of what look like “serious, politically motivated abuses by the FBI and Justice Department. And liberals are cheering the abuse,” the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=25dbb5b643&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| “If [House Democrats] really were interested in improving the country, they would be working as quickly as possible to target relief to only those most in need while finding ways to safely reopen as much of the economy as possible—not advocating for costly, nonsensical, politically motivated reforms,” Justin Haskins writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d744f8bfd1&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fca1347315&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e54fe69b66&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2034e82de2)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: Donald Trump: Not a doctor.
body:
His latest recs: Drink bleach and take an unproven drug. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/FJ4jR36JRgGlVqP-LGzstA/h0/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUId-2BjWrqqfrUlr5OgQ-2BFTiELT6QYp4m7Wpa-2FEypK86oXiZ2yHJ5A5igv-2FLEbP7dF47MIkwicYStO1uxqmAV1wFncZ2hafLMDYlPCcgCByiAogD-2FsVqC8dz6nt0SAVo6987-2B-2BztaVFBAHFXjetNU8kDZAg0-2BgfRW89-2FF4rwskGsJnFGysivklA6tZ3OOkbXQ3pqoJLNVJt6-2BXdl7HpQ-2BOpuUNMs-2FB7lchs2fYkHeOTQu8Sf2pXb1ApTVuQzfKdlPVyvw-3D/p0hM) We just hit a new low, Friend.

During a press conference yesterday, Trump offered more dangerous medical advice.

He claimed that, to protect himself from COVID-19, he's taking hydroxychloroquine. That’s an anti-malarial drug that, according to the FDA and other experts, could actually make COVID-19 patients sicker, not healthier.

As if advising the American people to inject bleach into our bodies wasn't enough.

And, since making this dangerous statement, he’s doubled down on Twitter, going on the warpath against any journalist or government official who, out of concern for American lives, has spoken up about the importance of following the advice of, well, actual medical experts — not politicians who have mismanaged this public health crisis so badly that more than 90,000 Americans have died in the space of just a few months.

**Let’s be clear here: As a result of Trump’s careless words, countless more Americans will get sick.

[ We need to send a clear, simple message to our friends and neighbors: Donald Trump is not a doctor and we shouldn’t be turning to him for medical advice. Share this graphic on Facebook now to get that message out! ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/FJ4jR36JRgGlVqP-LGzstA/h1/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5JJpKUiYwJUj6qqsB-2F4UY0mIz9z5zC7n92LJZfIEKWnyh99m1b2OLo2NgeUNmEOCOlYv2Q5NKGTKM8U1fuQHj0LlZ6yTffvFjU6qniRPc5ubxyu99VgGhQcTKLWyZ-2FuU2K38DafBtecXI22rLO9MXphChfbuuQNShLGZQvkbeWM01P5xoSz7BYFXYh5d3gLBYnY6uAgsXmVjxeg6-2BXdcSPcVSvn2lH6SJBUNfCkLCfx7IDxsZWFTe8CNXoGjhZH4pvCVRydh1tuSssStGoC9XiWzL-2Bvnldz2KHk90VXV805Aw-3D-3D/TgUJ) **

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/FJ4jR36JRgGlVqP-LGzstA/h2/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5JJpKUiYwJUj6qqsB-2F4UY0mIz9z5zC7n92LJZfIEKWnyhRM72uy9EyFXgpvOO-2FZS2gVNPKrbGhUS6-2BGVN5WgJBaOx5SkpJBh6cvlIqBlW-2FsbN3WeJ-2FvowDYhPotjR8ZkTzsi0mtf-2BSMvaEuMcnKTB-2FoY1Cp523oOPLN8JyvcGsr6XffPXWgzZfxeMCo2SBa29o8Jb57nUb0CcuwNQ26U1GyMB0zltvAASl6C2kdWR425h33cnsxG1dxwSEhioiPyVjpWZjgvRVhaQIYMLC0aK7-2FKIyDWQ6SDlf-2BWWakh-2FMg2w-3D-3D/aV5m)
We’ve recognized a scary pattern in this public health crisis. Whenever Trump is facing a lot of criticism for his poor response to this pandemic, he starts making reckless and dangerous claims that endanger Americans’ lives even further. Then the cycle repeats.

And when civil servants like Richard Bright try to break this cycle, speaking up in an effort to save American lives, Trump doesn’t view them as partners or a valuable resource. He views them as a threat. Bright warned the White House that first responders didn’t have the personal protective equipment that they needed — and that medical experts did not recommend hydroxychloroquine as a treatment for COVID-19.

Trump’s response was his favorite line from his days on The Apprentice: “You’re fired.”

**[ It’s clear that we can’t convince Trump to listen to the medical experts on the best response to this crisis. Instead, we have to convince our friends and neighbors to listen to them — and to stop listening to Trump. Share the graphic on Facebook. It truly is a matter of life and death. ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/FJ4jR36JRgGlVqP-LGzstA/h3/Nejq3qQQ6Jn1R8HM5bnp8LbS3uo1-2BN0t5mBIwfpIi5JJpKUiYwJUj6qqsB-2F4UY0mIz9z5zC7n92LJZfIEKWnyp7t2-2BjxIwF8NzEEeU58EP1fSnu3ahD7XBbUXV8VXJ9Rookut0N9bOYiwDjwsWgNf0umYFnQbBbl42XQZEFD38rrcbZNxDTEThpYKWvBMc3MXBZp91lbTVl-2BpFLplSSmU8MNQkuHV0PEyX-2BZG-2BbKGrftwn86S3k2uHELOEUq2JyHCp8hIXAXJUMt4WQ5YWHG8S-2F3LrubfWnWKrjOvzNLlrrb1r3M3amJUR-2BlvNnRWpFhcC85d-2BsQyrDxwJ9NrHR68w-3D-3D/zzqV) **

Thanks,

The Defeat Disinfo Team

P.S. The fight against Trump’s lies is about so much more than sending him back to Mar-a-Lago this November. In the context of this public health crisis, every lie we drown out is another life saved — but getting our message out there is expensive. **[Chip in $5 or more now to help convince people that, when it comes to their health, Trump is the last person they should take advice from.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/FJ4jR36JRgGlVqP-LGzstA/h4/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNII0-2Bssn41oEhsR47MncZ3Syi7M8pf0F4wg9lz5P9WjLTDEewunV6GUuSLCDFcjBYksxnDW2DzUrte24lT0E-2FG5g0PH4owZ9twBX46OGN5texijv7kKc-2BoVn-2BACoND53kgZULoJxgMkKxFQeJIw3qCTlJamK3JOco8X8uvx1JMdyRk1-2Bf30rx3KlI5RO-2BqXgiW3iTfCwPMXWu0GMqHWe2KxdM4IRLKRguwmCRyex2BitD0edI0uDA5lxj1RTPuTlbgzlGbZvLZOLZvjSZpOYF9QRPUZ58hh1LoTkTsQgx59-2F1aoD-2BL-2Fksld1mLo3bRRfrQzRjXdSEDhh9IFxTm4BzAj4bWLUqL-2Bss2DoxI7WfaaMg-3D-3D/qk4B) **

_If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies[here](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.31w/FJ4jR36JRgGlVqP-LGzstA/h5/JNCkEEFZowJokrW2UsHTjnWDm8s9fPBOm3K9t7TFUIeLF2yp97wbWjj3WOEnX2RH5yh57QLWEWmQgWDgmBC9hOoQshBuUU8oeNQzeJAmVtjHC-2B7P8qnlDeTGM0CqQmsG7cY5wz2pErt9k70uc2-2BLJ84wv-2B9qiFqeU6CfkRPn3oMoSooYmE3ufZohtnPp09iwYnplk8CxQ1bRs-2BLTiZsYRYxbbTEUcXAAwlKfaSSv9jhLsvyuHKPkrhGs0l51vJ9K-2B4StJH-2B1ck77ByzaBt0id0vblSkWjAPRHmNtKQ59D3I-3D/rts5)._

My other opponents donations have come almost entirely from industry insiders. He continues to brag about endorsements from the very people he would regulate.

body:
It's the last chance to choose a Conservative Republican Voice to reclaim our seat in Congress from Do-Nothing Kurt Schrader.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/amyfororegon.com/lets-put-a-conservative-oregonian-back-in-congress-6372590?e=36bbc8e2ca)
https://amyfororegon.com?utm_source=Amy+Ryan+Courser+for+Congress&utm_campaign=4a08caf923-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_04_14_02_13_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_0625c183a9-4a08caf923-221104281

** Peter...This Is It. Today is the LAST DAY for you to choose who will represent your conservative Oregon values in the race for U.S. Congress!
------------------------------------------------------------
I'm Amy Ryan Courser, and I am asking to be your Republican choice in Oregon's Congressional District 5 so that we can reclaim our conservative seat from the Know-Nothing, Do-Nothing liberal Democrat Kurt Schrader.

For decades, Schrader has been an active participant in the socialist agenda that's tearing at American morals & our thriving economy. And now, when we need responsible leadership the most, Kurt Schrader is siding with Nancy Pelosi and all the other liberal Dems that only want to obstruct our recovery...not solve the problems.

Today, with your support and your vote, we can begin to take back Congress. BUT YOU MUST MAIL YOUR BALLOT BY TODAY and make sure you cast your vote for Amy Ryan Courser for Congress in CD5.

Thank you for your vote, and God Bless America!

** Amy Ryan Courser

503-343-4740
5434 River Rd. N #219

amy@amyfororegon.com (mailto:amy@amyfororegon.com)

** NOW IS THE TIME TO KEEP AMERICA GREAT!

With me as the Republican candidate, the CD5 Congressional seat is WINNABLE, now more than ever! Kurt Schrader already has more than $3,000,000 in the bank, so I need your help to WIN IN NOVEMBER 2020!

** I’m asking that you donate any amount you’re comfortable making so that Oregonians like us can take back our district from the left and save our State before it’s too late.

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Tired of Socialists - I Name Names.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ)
---
Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.**

I am a patriot who has had it with unconstitutional lockdown orders, given by liberal Trump-hating socialist Democrats who are trying to tank the economy to hurt the President politically.
_**Mean-spirited left-wing partisan hack governors have been punishing ordinary citizens all across the country, for the "crime" of trying to feed their families and avoid losing their businesses.**_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ)
---

In Michigan, their Democrat Governor is persecuting small businesses like a 77-year old barber:

_State regulators on Wednesday suspended the license of a 77-year-old Michigan barber who insisted on cutting hair despite an order to stay closed during the coronavirus pandemic._

_Karl Manke has pledged to keep his shop open “until Jesus comes.” A judge declined the state’s request to shut down his shop Monday without first holding a hearing. Regulators took a different path by suspending his barber license and his shop license._

In Oregon, their governor sent Child Protective Services to harass a small business owner who tried to open in defiance of their Democrat governor's order:

_Oregon Occupational Safety and Health issued a $14,000 fine to Lindsey Graham, owner of Glamor Salon in Salem, for reopening her salon May 5 in defiance of Gov. Kate Brown's stay-home order._

_"I'm being threatened and intimidated and bullied daily by the government," Graham said during a press conference Friday. "I'm sad that I can drive 20 minutes down the freeway, and that person's job as a hairstylist is essential, according to Kate Brown. But my job, 20 minutes up the street, is nonessential."_

_"I don't want anyone to get sick. I know you guys don't want anyone to get sick," Graham said. "But I also don't want to go bankrupt and lose everything I worked for and neither do you."_

_She also claimed that Child Protective Services had visited her house and questioned her child. "I've never expected such a violent, aggressive, vindictive thing could ever be done to me or my family," she said, "because I'm trying to earn a living, because I'm trying to work."_

Here in North Carolina, we have another one of these abusive governors, Roy Cooper.

This guy is every bit the tinpot dictator that the governors of Michigan and Oregon are. You may recall that the Republican National Convention (which I will attend as a Trump delegate!) is in Charlotte, NC in August:

_President Donald Trump this week accused North Carolina Gov. Roy Cooper of “playing politics” with reopening the state, and said it would be “bad for them” if the state were to delay the start of the Republican National Convention in Charlotte.

“No, no,” Trump replied. “We’ll have a convention. I’m a traditionalist, but we’ll have to see, like everything else, but I think we’ll be in good shape by that time. We have a great state, North Carolina, that’s been very, very good._

_“Although, it’s got a Democrat governor, so we have to be a little bit careful.**It’s got a Democrat governor, so we have to be a little bit careful with that, because they’re playing politics.** They’re playing politics, as you know, by delaying the openings. ... To me that’s politics. They think it’s a bad thing for me if they delay the opening. I think it’s bad for them. And you have people protesting outside, and those people like Trump.”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ)
---

Our hyper-partisan governor would cancel the RNC if he thought he could get away with it. That's how these tyrannical Democrat governors roll. I have never met anyone so lost in what he is doing. A lost socialist is very very dangerous because you combine incompetence with bad left wing policy at the same time.

I've had it with these people. It is now abundantly clear that their motives were NEVER to keep anyone safe or healthy. It's to accumulate power for themselves, punish those who work for a living to support their families, and tank the economy for the election.

_**I am disgusted and shocked by their actions. No red-blooded American should ever stand for tyranny, and no one should stand for political-fueled retributions, either. **_

If you are proud of our president, as I am, **[I need YOUR help urgently](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ) to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!**

Let's send a message to the Socialist NC governor. Let's show these tyrants that they can't get away with this.

I am proud of those who are standing to fight with me. I have already been endorsed by _Congressman Mark Walker, Congressman Ted Budd, and Congressman Mark Meadows_. Here is a picture of me and Mark Meadows. Congressman Meadows used to be Chairman of the Freedom Caucus, and now he is the President Trump’s Chief of Staff in the White House. He “proudly endorsed” me shortly before his promotion, which I was so honored!

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ)
---

President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from the socialists, like these governors. _Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!_

**It is so crucial that we take advantage of every chance we have to flip a swing district** \- which North Carolina’s First District now is! They just redrew the map and took away a bunch of Democrat voters, making this district MUCH more competitive.

But this year, this district turned into a swing district. **Half of the district has never been represented by Butterfield**. They don’t know him, and they are Republicans!

[Will you help me beat Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ) I need you to send $15, $35, or $250 right now so that I can meet my goal by the end of this month. This deadline is so critical, and I have no time to lose.

**_I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!_**

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I [really need your help](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ). I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=i43eih691pNxmng&b=KwUfqJygLutQSt_GZ.ykXQ) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC

P.O. Box 434
Winterville NC 28590
USA

name: Greg Stanton
subject: I want to say thank you to the heroes keeping us safe and healthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6IkIADIaZtUFtSqAyu21OLy6U76ELjow3yeD6PVgUt4=/DlRG-fTyAcOj1hkSoJD6HAUD2x7pZnl9z-Hhp_x0viQ=)

On behalf of all Arizonans, I want to say thank you to the brave members of our community who have put their health on the line to keep us safe as frontline workers, including nurses, doctors, grocers, pharmacists, first responders, and more.

[**Will you join me in signing on to my thank you card to these essential workers to show our gratitude for all they are doing to keep us safe, fed, and healthy >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6IkIADIaZtUFtSqAyu21OLy6U76ELjow3yeD6PVgUt4=/DlRG-fTyAcOj1hkSoJD6HAUD2x7pZnl9z-Hhp_x0viQ=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6IkIADIaZtUFtSqAyu21OLy6U76ELjow3yeD6PVgUt4=/DlRG-fTyAcOj1hkSoJD6HAUD2x7pZnl9z-Hhp_x0viQ=)

These frontline heroes have helped our communities come together to fight back against this COVID-19 pandemic.

**As this pandemic continues, we must make sure our frontline workers are supported, which is why I am fighting in Congress for stronger paid sick leave, hazard pay, disbursement of PPE, emergency child care, and more for our frontline heroes. **

[**Will you sign on to thank our frontline workers?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/6IkIADIaZtUFtSqAyu21OLy6U76ELjow3yeD6PVgUt4=/DlRG-fTyAcOj1hkSoJD6HAUD2x7pZnl9z-Hhp_x0viQ=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/6IkIADIaZtUFtSqAyu21OLy6U76ELjow3yeD6PVgUt4=/DlRG-fTyAcOj1hkSoJD6HAUD2x7pZnl9z-Hhp_x0viQ=)

Thank you for showing our heroes on the frontlines your gratitude,

\-- _ Greg_

Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

body:
This election is going to be a knock-down-drag-out fight to the finish. Democrats aren't going to pull any punches. We're counting on you to help us fight back and win in November.

Friend, I am reaching out with an extremely important request.

Republican Senate campaigns need your immediate help! The liberal establishment is throwing everything they've got towards flipping just 4 seats to seize the Senate Majority. [**Help us stop Chuck Schumer from becoming Majority Leader - **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TWkC6THIgZ3a1xyUwLyYVv973QI1_sbmkeyMW2l6P35H9qvuh_Ho0ejwImXLdeqzoffEKirrUu6-vdLGVpVs5N4s8wwcnmXHiW_NM1qBa_vH7tc-osXPMRbz31Z97gN5KFqzE3-qydCfM3sEXx4y-wfehfqJfXKrTlIxDpokJi30a03YCYXRtEHO94rv9BbkM57AeNFXMSPiGcSI1c08hC7SOV9KvZdwT2vfuYVdvo4rCmnmif2rBCqmGTTGfiTM5Y_HJQmMRhS4p3bSr9o6x-lk7pAnkuoqJenm2dZSLNsLBmhicUu3l9PrqZpmN4AYcPx4TaODuN4nvl4_GOuGJDvgHIUXDxO984y1Yf5rkeirM7eDWW9FdVRwZFPtdSBZzZ6TcbGQ_E18GlssRC71cHYULGxC5S--jzWg_-bZPyW7ptTIOY6-sm5AVzHD15Wq&c=8nUPjKP5CWN8_Hsmo4pf42_ZrApiz8Xq81BXcg6OgOvKIrrN0DHf_g==&ch=OXj84F97WPmKzPwhS9TyKlU5Rg2vHeZeVez1CSyuXx2WyMQuswVASQ==)**[Donate immediately!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TWkC6THIgZ3a1xyUwLyYVv973QI1_sbmkeyMW2l6P35H9qvuh_Ho0ejwImXLdeqzGaViddyDRWvtLbH_B_IOBThMYntSYXBywEjzG7faJTyVpMTW_mqVmRQBvuJ1QZerDv1iavfuOalZGUaMURDPD7BGBUQO80GRokARzYwhUatSXE8WnrrbGILhG7b9EA1x1L5aXUOp7eNOLec9i0iPbRxFREMLWOE0oceJAsdXn3K-TrrYSOHpL0GLGBjtzDW_UonC4ee-98N1d5Z2GPB2g4CCRAQnYTrZ3BcIja7HGs-zYkBpfOHewwKyIciYKH0IcGv564ixARoFkWKv-LBIaYOm0T1xMzqASHqACKxVEGiIdGN0YMWIqQtjgv3wd3RZhEliP6CBNmUIosV3nsa8bUQjo74_CDw3k32tLTv4-cueGo0ZWnOIn7m7WKFsrJyR&c=8nUPjKP5CWN8_Hsmo4pf42_ZrApiz8Xq81BXcg6OgOvKIrrN0DHf_g==&ch=OXj84F97WPmKzPwhS9TyKlU5Rg2vHeZeVez1CSyuXx2WyMQuswVASQ==) >>**

_**I need you to take immediate action; otherwise, we risk losing our Majority in the Senate.**_ If the Democrats take over, it would be a major setback for President Trump's Making America Great Again agenda. **[Make a 5X-Matched donation NOW to defend President Trump 's Majority](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TWkC6THIgZ3a1xyUwLyYVv973QI1_sbmkeyMW2l6P35H9qvuh_Ho0ejwImXLdeqzfl3mtvqpCMajepfCcGfJJ9AZaDovwny9blXrlkQfNY4bto1TfFRtCUfQIjRgLLBSTuY1_Ki4BTzMf6wQyXdgHALlju_kSccgEvxK_1KZTYVK6T6BQ-pectTIxodibJMGL7xFGyWtZq7TTyWvOxCSKq8dbussqfXIInYrYEEgdDVg7hBuitCWTLgBaVyHYWodcqpUx7G-DGBJhqIQwuaDNqO395ny9mmhwTerMZCoWWUJVCdmLLHNN76g41mIweQgoy30oJOvE74lIg7mY2gHm6QTlc6LJK1XDdgrNr7msgCCCYaNah5G8EltdJQhqBdo5wfBAJVTDj5WJ-mFRrU74iHG0x07BE9MJ8ElGSu---gJWJa9fHJyyatVs3ZjlGlZ&c=8nUPjKP5CWN8_Hsmo4pf42_ZrApiz8Xq81BXcg6OgOvKIrrN0DHf_g==&ch=OXj84F97WPmKzPwhS9TyKlU5Rg2vHeZeVez1CSyuXx2WyMQuswVASQ==)!**

Friend, I am reaching out with an extremely important request. Republican Senate campaigns need your immediate help! The liberal establishment is throwing everything they've got towards flipping just 4 seats to seize the Senate Majority. == >> We can't afford to sit around and do nothing while Democrats scheme to take our Majority. Mike Bloomberg, George Soros, Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and all of their cronies are providing substantial resources to Democratic campaigns, which has allowed them to OUTRAISE our Republican candidates. Friend --
Nancy Pelosi's Liberal wish list is BAD for Alabama and BAD for America.
She first refused to get Congress back to work, then she attacked President Trump's leadership, now she unveiled a plan chock-full of Socialist programs.
**We need SOLUTIONS, not SOCIALISM.**
That's why we need you to fight alongside President Trump and House Conservatives to help American Families. Pelosi's mega-donors won't stand a chance if everyone who reads this email chips in $10. Can you help?

[**I 'm hoping you have the courage to stand up to Pelosi and her cronies. Congressman Robert Aderholt (AL-04)
