name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Add your name: Demand that Congress protect consumers
body:
Peter,

A team of economists just released a new study that analyzed the spending patterns of Americans who’ve received their stimulus check. Here’s what they found:

“'Given the size of the 2020 stimulus checks, we might have expected large impacts on categories like automobile spending, electronics, appliances, and home furnishings,' according to economists at Columbia University, Northwestern University, the University of Chicago... 'Instead, it seems that individuals are catching up with rent and bill payments as well as engaging in spending on food, personal care, and nondurables.'”

Thirty-six million Americans are out of work and nearly half of all households earning less than $40,000 annually no longer have a steady source of income -- and economists are surprised that our stimulus is going straight towards food, rent, and paying the bills?

Working families are struggling to make ends meet -- but Congress can step in to alleviate some of that burden. We need to demand that Congress cancel rent payments; pause all payments of debt and cancel interest, late fees, or other penalties for nonpayment; and protect stimulus payments from debt collectors. Congress must protect consumers, because we can’t pay our bills without an income. If you agree, will you sign this petition today calling on our leaders to enact consumer protection measures in the next COVID package? https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-demand-the-next-congressional-covid-package-protect-consumers-we-cannot-pay-our-bills-without-an-income?source=2020ProtectConsumersCOVIDPackage_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabconsumerprotection

TELL CONGRESS TO PROTECT CONSUMERS https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-demand-the-next-congressional-covid-package-protect-consumers-we-cannot-pay-our-bills-without-an-income?source=2020ProtectConsumersCOVIDPackage_AB&referrer=group-adem-bunkeddeko-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fabconsumerprotection

Best,
Adem

DONATE TODAY https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab051920

BECOME A VOLUNTEER ademforcongress.com/volunteer-2

VISIT OUR WEBSITE ademforcongress.com

name: Josh Hicks
subject: A campaign we can be proud of
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
Hey there —

I wanted to follow up on the emails my team and I sent you last week.

We were so honored when a couple from Lexington reached out and said they wanted to match online donations. And in just 5 days, we hit (and passed) our $3,000 match goal.

We raised $3,220 from over 80 supporters — giving an average gift of just over $38.

Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign, whether you’ve given $5 or $50 dollars, or even if you haven’t been able to give.

We’re building this campaign one grassroots supporter, donor, and volunteer at a time. That’s how we’ll build a campaign we’re proud of, and how we’ll win in November.

Thank you,

Josh

Contribute >> secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-may?refcode=HIC_20200519_em_fr_matchty_all_pt_atest

Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is a Democrat running to represent Kentucky’s 6th Congressional District. He will be a representative who puts the needs of his constituents front and center in Washington. Josh grew up in Fleming County before leaving to serve in the Marines. After two deployments, he returned to Kentucky to serve his community as a police officer and attorney.

He’s running to represent hardworking, everyday Kentuckians. Not corporations. That means his campaign is relying on grassroots donations — lots of small donations from emails like this — not big checks from corporate special interests. Please consider making a $5 contribution to Josh’s campaign today. [secure.actblue.com/donate/jhicks-may?refcode=HIC_20200519_em_fr_matchty_all_ptftr_atest]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/ec0d2478-139a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd/ed0d2478-139a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDBkMjQ3OC0xMzlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JQCaI-D21YGOWXOBNfn2Uv4PPbeRL6fIJ60mwfJlhrQ=&id=120613561&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com

name: Dem Senate Update
subject: Kelly Loeffler's (R-GA) corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
BREAKING: GOP senator sold off MILLIONS in stock before the coronavirus crisis took hold.
| | |
---
Friend, _The_ _Washington Post_ says winning in Georgia is the KEY to Democrats taking back the Senate - so this is alarming news:
| | | | Our Republican opponent - Kelly Loeffler - is _flooding_ the race with $20 million of her personal fortune to buy this seat. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | _POLITICO_ says Mitch McConnell is lining up "the full backing of the Republican establishment" to support her. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Worst of all: News just broke that she knew critical information about the coronavirus threat and instead of telling the public, dropped MILLIONS in stock before the crisis took hold. |
---|---|---|---
**With an opponent like this, failure is simply not an option.**
**_That's why we need your urgent support, friend_.** Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats CAN win in Georgia and take back the Senate - but if we lose here, we'll hand Senate control back to McConnell.
**[Friend: If you're ready to take back the Senate, will you give $5 or more now so we can defeat McConnell's chosen candidate and flip this seat blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e788/288179be/bf97b83/348ea09d/2368977625/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
At times like these, we need moral leadership in the Senate - leaders who will fight for the people, not just their personal bottom line. Our Republican opponent has spent so much time in corporate board rooms and Washington back rooms that she can no longer be trusted to do what's right.
**Winning this race is critical, but it won't be easy. For us to defeat our GOP opponent, flip Georgia blue and end McConnell's reign in the Senate, we need immediate grassroots support. But r****ight now, we're falling $11,356 short of our crucial goal - and time is running out before the midnight deadline. The _only_ way we'll close this gap is if every single grassroots supporter pitches in right now. [Friend: If you want to take back the Senate, will you give $5 or more so we can defeat Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate and flip Georgia blue?](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e788/288179be/bf97b83/348ea09d/2368977625/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMjM0LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk234-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Today, I'm proud to endorse 14 Warren Democrats up and down the ballot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
If we all do our part today to lay the groundwork for victory this fall, a new slate of leaders will take office next January. And they'll be a breath of fresh air and a burst of energy in the fight | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852572a/45c30650/1cb5a37f8/66e92f78/3855068618/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
It's more important than ever to help elect leaders up and down the ballot who will fight for bold reforms and put people first.

Today, I'm proud to endorse another slate of candidates across the country who will do just that:

**State Legislature**

Gloria Johnson (TN-HD13)

Yuh-Line Niou (NY-HD64)

Alessandra Biaggi (NY-SD34)

Catalina Cruz (NY-HD39)

**U.S. House**

Lucy McBath (GA-06)

Wendy Davis (TX-21)

Joaquin Castro (TX-20)

Jerry Nadler (NY-10)

Matt Cartwright (PA-08)

Michelle De La Isla (KS-02)

Georgette Gomez (CA-53)

Hillary Scholten (MI-03)

**U.S. Senate**

MJ Hegar (TX-SEN)

Theresa Greenfield (IA-SEN)
[Add your name to say you're getting in this fight to help elect these amazing leaders. They're counting on fellow Warren Democrats like you for support.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852572a/45c30650/1cb5a37f8/66e92f7b/3855068618/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIxMEZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNTE5X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-endorsements?source=EMR10F_ANN_END_E_20200519_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Making big, structural change in 2021 and beyond doesn't just start with the November elections. It starts right now.

Now is the time to fight to help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot by organizing, volunteering, building a grassroots movement, and laying out a bold vision for the future. And these candidates need our help to get that done.

If we all do our part today to lay the groundwork for victory this fall, a new slate of leaders will take office next January. And they'll be a breath of fresh air and a burst of energy in the fight to make our economy, our government, and our democracy work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.

[**So please, sign up to help elect these great candidates and help lay the groundwork now for the big, structural change our country needs.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852572a/45c30650/1cb5a37f8/66e92f7b/3855068618/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVIxMEZfQU5OX0VORF9FXzIwMjAwNTE5X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-wd-endorsements?source=EMR10F_ANN_END_E_20200519_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

clean_body: If we all do our part today to lay the groundwork for victory this fall, a new slate of leaders will take office next January. And they'll be a breath of fresh air and a burst of energy in the fight | | | "" It's more important than ever to help elect leaders up and down the ballot who will fight for bold reforms and put people first. Today, I'm proud to endorse another slate of candidates across the country who will do just that: State Legislature Gloria Johnson (TN-HD13) Yuh-Line Niou (NY-HD64) Alessandra Biaggi (NY-SD34) Catalina Cruz (NY-HD39) U.S. House Lucy McBath (GA-06) Wendy Davis (TX-21) Joaquin Castro (TX-20) Jerry Nadler (NY-10) Matt Cartwright (PA-08) Michelle De La Isla (KS-02) Georgette Gomez (CA-53) Hillary Scholten (MI-03) U.S. Senate MJ Hegar (TX-SEN) Theresa Greenfield (IA-SEN) "" Making big, structural change in 2021 and beyond doesn't just start with the November elections. It starts right now. Now is the time to fight to help elect Warren Democrats up and down the ballot by organizing, volunteering, building a grassroots movement, and laying out a bold vision for the future. And these candidates need our help to get that done. If we all do our part today to lay the groundwork for victory this fall, a new slate of leaders will take office next January. And they'll be a breath of fresh air and a burst of energy in the fight to make our economy, our government, and our democracy work for everyone, not just the rich and powerful. | | Friends,

We suspected it was true, but _**now we have the numbers . . .**_
**Joe Cunningham is in trouble**.
A [NEW POLL](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=b10ccec0cc&e=f1831b4ca2) released today shows him at just 43 percent for reelection even after spending **$$ ONE MILLION DOLLARS $$** so far... and** ****_without_** a primary opponent!

The same poll shows us _**leading the race**_ , and shows we have the best chance to _**defeat the incumbent in November.**_
---
| [ ](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=52f64e2c16&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| That’s the good news.

This will be no small feat. **Joe already has a $2 million warchest** , and we still have a primary to win. **Do you agree we need a fiscally conservative, Independent voice for the Lowcountry? ** Someone who will:
* Never give in to the _big spending_ of either party
* Protect our _freedoms _and only vote for _balanced budgets _
* Be the _hardest working member of Congress _

It’s time to send a **NEW NANCY** to Congress! But I can only get there with your support.
---

Sincerely

name: Sara 2020
subject: Susan Collins is "concerned" that Trump just fired his fourth Inspector General in just six weeks.
body:
She always says she is "concerned" or "disappointed" but doesn't do anything to hold Trump accountable.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b57/4bef7a87/6cd2ae1a/287e7e99/613339166/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
**President Trump fired his FOURTH Inspector General in just six weeks.**
He's trying to cover up incompetence and corruption in his administration by firing all the watchdogs whose job it is to root it out. And this is what Susan Collins had to say about it:
**_" I am concerned about the President's firing of [Inspector Generals]"_**
This is typical Susan Collins. She says something vague about being "concerned" or "disappointed" but she refuses to do anything to hold him accountable.
We've had enough. If you're ready for a Senator you can count on to do the right thing, here's what you can do:
**[Chip in to support Sara Gideon's campaign to defeat Senator Collins today. Any amount you can afford makes a difference.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b57/4bef7a87/6cd2ae1a/287e7e98/613339166/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA1MTktMS10MiJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-may-2020?refcode=em200519-1-t2")**
Senator Collins and Majority Leader Mitch McConnell are _never_ going to hold Trump accountable for his actions. We can all stop holding our breath.
That's why it's so important that we win this race and take back the U.S. Senate for Democrats.
All our best,
Team Sara
**********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b57/4bef7a87/6cd2ae1a/287e7e98/613339166/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDA1MTktMS10MiJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-may-2020?refcode=em200519-1-t2")**********

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b57/4bef7a87/6cd2ae1a/287e7e9f/613339166/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802b57/4bef7a87/6cd2ae1a/287e7e9d/613339166/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Warner
subject: "we're going after Virginia"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
President Trump just outright said that he and his allies are "going after Virginia."
|
---
| | Hi Derek --

We'll get right to the point. President Trump just outright said that he and his allies are "going after Virginia." (Plus, he made a comment about guarding potatoes that didn't quite make sense.)

**The fight to keep Virginia blue in 2020 isn 't small potatoes, and neither is the progress we've made in the Commonwealth.** We need your help to keep going. Every dollar helps us build a stronger campaign to keep Mark Warner in the Senate and to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. **[If you're able, will you chip in to help keep Mark Warner in the Senate, fighting for us?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d48c/53d9897e/54e3e598/1c8874db/1074261770/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-potatoes?refcode=20200519_f_1_nd__585__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We already knew that the GOP was targeting Virginia -- the Trump Victory Initiative organized more than 90 events across the Commonwealth in 2019, and donors are pouring money into our state. They're trying to roll back the progress we've made: expanded voting access and commonsense gun safety laws to name a few. **But this admission from President Trump shows that they 're not giving up the fight -- and neither are we.**

**[Can you chip today so we're not caught off guard in November?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d48c/53d9897e/54e3e598/1c8874da/1074261770/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-potatoes?refcode=20200519_f_1_nd__585__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thanks for your help -- your support is what keeps this team moving forward.

-- Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d48c/53d9897e/54e3e598/1c8874d9/1074261770/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU4NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-potatoes?refcode=20200519_f_1_nd__585__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---
|

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Let's win Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890047/7f51f7bc/4e52c3ea/4ef6b8dc/2130631447/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

I'm proud to endorse MJ Hegar, and I want to tell you exactly why: MJ believes we need big, structural change -- and she's going to fight for it.

I told MJ I'd do everything I can to help her, so I'm setting a goal to raise $10,000 today. **[Will you join me in supporting MJ by making a donation of $3 right now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890047/7f51f7bc/4e52c3ea/4ef6b8d3/2130631447/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgsoc?refcode=email_20200519.2nd__1450__&amount=3")**

I've been fighting to root out corruption and put power in the hands of the people -- where it belongs -- not in the hands of giant corporations and special interests.

That's MJ's fight, too. Like me, she hasn't spent her whole career in politics trying to please big donors to fund campaign after campaign -- in fact, she only decided to run for office after she was shut out of the process by her own representatives because she wasn't writing them big campaign checks.

MJ knows that when something doesn't make a whole lot of sense in Washington, all you have to do is follow the money. Her opponent has taken millions of dollars from the special interests -- like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and the insurance industry -- while refusing to support policies that the majority of Texans _and_ Americans believe in, like common-sense gun safety measures.

I've said it before and I'll say it again: It is NOT enough to win the White House in 2020. With Mitch McConnell as majority leader, we can kiss goodbye any hope of taking action on climate change, expanding health care coverage, or reforming our immigration system. Those bills would pass the House, but his desk would be their legislative graveyard.

**[We need to flip the Senate, and we need to win Texas. So I hope you'll join me in this fight and pitch in whatever you can to support MJ and help hit our $10,000 One-Day Goal:](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890047/7f51f7bc/4e52c3ea/4ef6b8d2/2130631447/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0NTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lfgsoc?refcode=email_20200519.2nd__1450__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

I told MJ I'd do everything I can to help her, so I'm setting a goal to raise $10,000 today. "" I've been fighting to root out corruption and put power in the hands of the people -- where it belongs -- not in the hands of giant corporations and special interests. That's MJ's fight, too. Like me, she hasn't spent her whole career in politics trying to please big donors to fund campaign after campaign -- in fact, she only decided to run for office after she was shut out of the process by her own representatives because she wasn't writing them big campaign checks. MJ knows that when something doesn't make a whole lot of sense in Washington, all you have to do is follow the money. Her opponent has taken millions of dollars from the special interests -- like the gun lobby, Big Pharma, and the insurance industry -- while refusing to support policies that the majority of Texans and Americans believe in, like common-sense gun safety measures. I've said it before and I'll say it again: It is NOT enough to win the White House in 2020. With Mitch McConnell as majority leader, we can kiss goodbye any hope of taking action on climate change, expanding health care coverage, or reforming our immigration system. Those bills would pass the House, but his desk would be their legislative graveyard. name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Let’s Hold Cuomo Accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Did you see the news this morning? I am [joining Congresswoman Elise Stefanik](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/aynLP6kTsBbBUVhN1892MmLg/pIt892jpg1ZlQS1rBWl380Sg) in calling for a robust and thorough investigation into Governor Cuomo's directive to send COVID-19 positive patients into nursing homes - exposing thousands of senior citizens to the virus and potentially causing thousands of deaths. ([Jacobs for Congress, 5/19/20](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/Y7rJEw6ffq7ryhCxWaB5dQ/pIt892jpg1ZlQS1rBWl380Sg)) While no investigation could ever take away the heartbreaking pain and grief thousands of families across our state are experiencing, they deserve to know what happened, and if there has been wrong-doing or negligence, they deserve justice. When I join the New York Congressional delegation in June, I pledge to join Rep. Stefanik and my other colleagues in ensuring a thorough federal investigation is launched and those responsible are held accountable - we owe it to all the members of our New York family we have tragically lost. Now more than ever, it is critically important we have strong conservative leadership in Congress to fight for Western New York and help President Trump rebuild our nation - make sure you vote on June 23rd to send that leadership to Washington and hold Cuomo accountable. Thank you for your continued support. I hope you and your families are staying safe during this time. Sincerely, Chris Jacobs
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/Tp1kWovTUe05LxabpXxieg/pIt892jpg1ZlQS1rBWl380Sg) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/fLwmbkpWYfawSXkuBi6g8g/pIt892jpg1ZlQS1rBWl380Sg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Your right to privacy!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| Peter,
Hi, my name is Tucker Dunn, and I am a pro-life, pro-constitution, Kansan conservative. I am a college student, and having grown up in the age of technology, I am concerned.

I am concerned today because the US Senate voted to reauthorize the USA PATRIOT Act. The PATRIOT Act was passed in response to the 9/11 attacks to allow better protection from terrorists, but since then has been amended by big-government politicians and now is used to surveil law-abiding citizens across the country.

I am concerned because the Senate has passed an amendment to the Patriot Act which allows the intelligence agencies to spy on cell phone info, including search history, without ever getting a warrant or letting someone know they’re being spied on. Do you trust corrupt Washington politicians with total power over all of your private information?

There is an anti-establishment, pro-term limit candidate, who I want to send to Washington next year, who will protect our right to privacy, and who will Drain the Swamp: my good friend Dave Lindstrom.

If you believe Americans have a right to privacy, to know if they’re being spied on, and that government officials should need a warrant before they tap into your most personal documents, vote for Dave Lindstrom and Drain the Swamp!

-Tucker Dunn
Intern for Dave Lindstrom for Senate

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: All of the COVID-19 resources you need are in RI's new app
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
We're working hard every day to advance our testing, contact tracing and community mitigation efforts so we can keep more Rhode Islanders safe. Today, we're taking a major step forward.
I'm thrilled to say that the first version of our mobile app, [CRUSH COVID RI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZEs3tyF12vfc5VgDtBq5VoMZvWypP6eWi-HgriOac4DB2RwTW047fIMmiY9qN2dCOSkLzdoNP0L-9gE8HtrScP6wJYoimpbslVhnXwoQWZqS&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==), is now available for free download on the [Apple App Store](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZEs3tyF12vfcfn4NIya-_I9sxl1-uYbt8GkzZ5oo-OF-Vs90S-2OBfjwyweFk3J-H4syZgufxTZ7BeWHL7MVnEPonROLeSQ3T39y4leC1fo1ng_Y5-tF2phvluay44QAPp9mDvn4XMTfZQLCjYGAWr85ylGhTkC5wg==&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==) and [Google Play](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZEs3tyF12vfcvAWhY_0wP1OtpRDWReKb6vJA6dkfGVkCTH7WhoJ4PKany-F9gfzrHCrcZlBGp-tfQXxo7mIHwN4bzx-i8cUbmcxhwjJkILF4jC3qA30swA92iU4fPcRTZCvMWVQO0KF1nnmykU0afH4QWOXOr1ifjg==&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==) in both English and Spanish. We're one of the first states in the country to release a mobile app to support our pandemic response and I'm especially proud of our strong focus on privacy.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZLK_keHQrDSgoBqenh2DLDESNu1eFhF-6XPSB4N-vbtjNv5o9WX6f6YG-yxShWiIgddOmcL5w3zWszePnC5MYp2gioB748qxGAn5LG48J9MkSoBD1odW_z998bZguaIzzfJYw3rEV-i7sUaEqrHFBhs=&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZLK_keHQrDSgoBqenh2DLDESNu1eFhF-6XPSB4N-vbtjNv5o9WX6f6YG-yxShWiIgddOmcL5w3zWszePnC5MYp2gioB748qxGAn5LG48J9MkSoBD1odW_z998bZguaIzzfJYw3rEV-i7sUaEqrHFBhs=&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| Here's what CRUSH COVID RI does:
---
|
---
| Resources: We know that those in quarantine and isolation may need help getting food delivered or finding a safe place to stay. Our veterans and seniors may need an extra hand. And all Rhode Islanders may need mental and behavioral health support during this crisis. This app can help by connecting you with the assistance you need to stay safe and healthy during this crisis.
---
|
---
| Information: CRUSH COVID RI will connect you to the latest COVID-19 news. You can watch our press conferences, learn more about our plans to reopen the economy and get the latest data and public health information about the virus.
---
|
---
| Testing: Rhode Island is leading the nation in per capita testing. If you ever need a test for yourself, CRUSH COVID RI lays out our testing options clearly so that you can find the option that fits your needs. We also connect you directly with our Self-Checker Tool to help you understand your personal risk and whether you should get tested.
---
|
---
| Symptom Checker: One of the main features of the app is our Symptom Checker. It's a quick, 10 second survey that asks you to self-report any symptoms you have. It then asks for your zip code so the Rhode Island Department of Health can see if there are any growing hotspots or if there are specific parts of the state where we need to expand access to testing.
---
|
---
| Location Diary: The app includes a completely optional location tracker. If you choose to use it, the app will create a map of the places you visit for 10 minutes or more. That data is stored on your phone only and automatically deletes after 20 days. It is only available to you--unless you get coronavirus and give specific consent to share your data with the Rhode Island Department of Health. If you choose to share it, your data will be stored anonymously and will only be connected to you by a case investigator at the Rhode Island Department of Health.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZEs3tyF12vfcmwKqi5vuQBG0_A4ybcl1dlFJ-QSQ_FNs558IysZr_dlUQJfIkRSwkufWbpOHKbYz2dRLFfRUPuc7WaYGJhR0h1ZsqAgayE0kDpQZX2TPJv6gb70UhXw4joumvZ1OoDW3E7BW31yXACbaGcbhqMWOnm8v-qUvT190&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==)
---
| I want to make one thing very clear: this is completely optional. No one is ever going to make you download CRUSH COVID RI and no one is going to make you turn on the location diary feature. You can use the app without it and just continue with your manual contact tracing journal. If you do use the Location Diary, no one is going to make you share that info with the Department of Health if you get coronavirus. These decisions are all up to you. That said, I hope you do download and use the app. Your participation will help us slow the spread of the virus and could save lives.
I want to be very clear that this is not the final product. This is only Version 1. Today I'm asking Rhode Islanders to be our beta testers--download the app, try it out and give us your feedback. What do you like? What don't you like? What could be working better? We want to hear from you. We're hoping to have a Version 2 of the app--which we expect will be the final product--out within a month, and we're going to incorporate your feedback. Visit [health.ri.gov/crushcovid](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZEs3tyF12vfcAQC1STdEE5bKpyHintbgf-7NfaSEFSVRquDkjq5A46VLv01qdA5wGEwXKCMZyxJHqV_ZXd6zar9XhTy_aJbWk99VQU-cQT5e&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==) and tell us what you think. With your help, Rhode Island can crush COVID.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019MoCyEAcYwOJ8Q8ineim3rBPBt8dNlbwlI9DoJgn8kqZEt8r68knZEs3tyF12vfcEgMsqmx-Ghhh2ipnCZTBieXQ-pTqnKfGhfGJgtcqxPYCYHitE7QWySPn_9SoV4VblI1_O5AnNedqAZ4J5Fwex3VsdfygfOsS817Rvvj7r5cnS8JOqzpx95vVE4_ZfDw5rJDXEKkEAGmNU0M6_syu5VSob6_pAPDp-tkiv8P6NauwW76yW1y7RImOgq48x8wuwe_3H3JZbE6d4g6TBzjEIJXjiVLzdcnhJM9P5ri-W01uLfgWfUx2jk4aKXEjEDta2R6N6ZynEeg=&c=elC2ZfbzZUrLYdD0yEHPH0yUiVrAsApEOtEUZc4CokLJWvKihF4c-w==&ch=MSVMgLslX8hZ5P6NYyfM4hNoquMdnk4gaR3SPhrlUONFZ9aHIA-8kg==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---
| [Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://visitor.constantcontact.com/do?p=un&m=001_rvij1smacIHQplL2vH8YA%3D&ch=e9e38b2e-7e90-11ea-b887-d4ae5292c4bc&ca=4de939f7-c825-443e-90ab-394daf645aac)
---

Sent by [communications@governor.ri.gov](mailto:communications@governor.ri.gov) in collaboration with
| [ ](http://www.constantcontact.com/index.jsp?cc=nge&rmc=VF19_3GE)
---

name: Team Mackler
subject: despicable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
There's no limit to what Hagerty will do.

| | This is despicable: There's no limit to how our extremist opponent Bill Hagerty will use his insider connections to fund his campaign -- even as hardworking Tennesseans struggle in the wake of an unprecedented health and economic crisis. **FIRST** : Hagerty is the **ONLY** political candidate placed on President Trump's COVID-19 Task Force -- because he knows Hagerty will rubber stamp whatever he and his allies tell him to rubber stamp. That's why so many of them have invested in installing him into the Senate. **THEN** : Hagerty jumped to the front of the line, skipping ahead of struggling small businesses, to get a **$2.5 million** sweetheart loan, courtesy of his banker friends looking to buy their next regulator. **AND NOW** : Hagerty and another Task Force member offered inside information on the recovery -- **_information that ALL Tennesseans need_** \-- in return for campaign contributions. **Hagerty trading inside information we all need for campaign cash is wrong and it 's why so many Tennesseans are saying "enough!"** [_**STOP ANOTHER RUBBER STAMP FROM MAKING IT TO THE SENATE ->**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa118/18d6a294/4ca07c8d/26d606c3/2754858490/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MTlfMyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0%3D/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200519_3?refcode=jme200519_3_m_other&refcode2=107423") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa118/18d6a294/4ca07c8d/26d606c0/2754858490/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA1MTlfMyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIiwiZTN0aGJXOTFiblI5ZlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200519_3?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jme200519_3_m_&refcode2=107423")

name: Sabrina Haake
subject: I have you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Sabrina Haake
body:
| [
---
Hi Neighbor, Dark Money is rearing its ugly head right here in Northwest Indiana.

A Colorado-based Super PAC is pouring money into advertising for one of my opponents, and, according to FEC reports, several other outside groups are looking to sway this race in favor of Big Industry.

What’s more, these groups use **loopholes** in the law and **shady tactics** to set up shop quickly and influence who represents us in Congress.

Here’s a piece of an article from _The Northwest Indiana Times, _“unlike most groups involved in political campaigns, including traditional political action committees (PACs), super PACs are allowed to raise and spend unlimited amounts of money and generally are **not required to disclose** the source of their funds before the election. According to the Federal Election Commission, _Democratic Progress_ is based at a **mailbox inside a UPS Store.”**

And that’s not the only one. Outside groups have spent nearly **half a million dollars** trying to influence this race for their own benefit. **I believe you, the voters, should decide this election,** not special interests. We are less than two weeks away from our primary election, and I need your help to counter this industry spending.

I don’t have a Super PAC. I have you. **And I’m NOT asking you for money** – all I’m asking for is your consideration when it comes time to vote. Do your homework, visit my website _**[GoSabrina.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17555307/198364492/-898961533?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTM2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzAwNmVkZS0zMDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nKonPaXQgouprMD5UrPcfdLPXhQX7ZZR4I1JvVyyOo=&emci=1de7a55a-2e9a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=63006ede-309a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=13514486)**_ , see if my stance on the issues aligns with your wants and needs. **I am humbly asking for your vote.** I will never take a dime of Dark Money, you can count on that. And I won’t let establishment outsiders decide what’s best for you and me.

I know Hoosiers need Medicare for All, and I**will fight** for it.

I know we need livable wages, paid sick and family leave, and **I will fight** for it.

I know Big Money has no place in politics, and that’s why I am against Citizens United and **I will fight** to get money OUT of politics. But I need to win this nomination in order to fight for us in Washington.

This campaign is about our values, and I know you value candidates who are true to their word and who will never let Dark Money influence their decisions.

Together, we can win this thing.

In gratitude,

Sabrina Sabrina Haake U.S. Congressional Candidate Indiana First District 219-234-3300 [SabrinaHaakeForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17555308/198364493/-993582743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTM2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzAwNmVkZS0zMDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nKonPaXQgouprMD5UrPcfdLPXhQX7ZZR4I1JvVyyOo=&emci=1de7a55a-2e9a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&emdi=63006ede-309a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&ceid=13514486) _[Join the Team](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17555309/198364494/1388548505?refcode2=63006ede-309a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&refcode2=63006ede-309a-ea11-86e9-00155d03b5dd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTM2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MzAwNmVkZS0zMDlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8nKonPaXQgouprMD5UrPcfdLPXhQX7ZZR4I1JvVyyOo=)_ Vote Sabrina Haake for Congress June 2nd, 2020

name: Claire
subject: Two weeks left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hi Peter \- it's Claire. I know you're probably sick of these emails. But here's why we keep sending them: The latest polls in our race show us in a dead heat, we only have two weeks until election day, and right now we don't have the resources to fund our critical Get Out The Vote operations.
I'm worried that if we fall short we could lose our best chance at giving New Mexico a better future by taking back the House and firing Nancy Pelosi.
Here's the good news: a group of donors stepped up to match all gifts between now and Thursday to help fund our GOTV operations. [We cannot afford to miss this opportunity -- so I'm asking you to please contribute $10 or more to help us finish strong and get the maximum bang for your buck! ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001i8HnaLUazH4spIzlRicciwmNoNe0EOjb1wLal61pO65hfoHgDyiQEFU03xrKchM30XkDwWQZEH0kofg1a5nV4nBYP9vrkpLIwvyiicTFoP14F-mDV6FiOT-sxrtbCUzlIRgc2E_Ah9Yj46ED3oCYVtz36cG8XLei_PDHwUd9-KE=&c=K_4FB0yxkzo3hPsmfM6Bou_Jnp-_40QHvF3FW7QRUFO1pf5GsTSSqA==&ch=hfXClqOrIyDfhpOuJgGq2fBSf-vl2Y5Tue2pa5hfD0pCFy4zWEoL3A==)

name: Kathy Landing for Congress
subject: MAJOR NEWS - 23 Local Leaders Endorse our Campaign
body:
| | | | Today, 23 current and former public servants from across South Carolina’s First Congressional District endorsed our campaign!
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg.--5RLdWC38VZzV5HDYhZIutZwVSiBia2SDQg==) in your browser.
---
Dear Lowcountry Neighbors, Wow! To say I am very excited would be a total understatement. Today, 23 current and former public servants from across South Carolina's First Congressional District endorsed our campaign! The endorsements from the local leaders listed below show that I am the "Lowcountry's Conservative for Congress." **I proudly admit that I 'm not the favored candidate of the Washington special interests.** Rather, _I am the trusted, business-minded conservative unifying Republicans in our district to beat Joe Cunningham._ If you are in that number - _a Lowcountry Republican committed to One of the most humbling endorsements received today comes from a leader I have had the pleasure to work alongside for the past three years, _Mount Pleasant Mayor Pro-Tempore_ Tom O'Rourke, who highlighted my diplomacy and professionalism in his endorsement. "The Lowcountry can have no one more prepared, pragmatic, and professional in Congress than Kathy Landing. Kathy Landing has proven time and again her ability to work well with her colleagues including those with differing opinions to achieve real results for our community. Kathy Landing will make us proud in Congress." With three weeks until the Republican Primary, I am truly honored to have earned the endorsements of the following leaders in our community:
* Former South Carolina First District Congressman **Tommy Hartnett** (Charleston County)
* National Journal's Most Conservative Member of Congress in 2011 **Randy Neugebauer** (Charleston County)
* Former Congresswoman and Chair of the Republican Study Committee **Sue Myrick** (Charleston County)

clean_body: | | | | Today, 23 current and former public servants from across South Carolina’s First Congressional District endorsed our campaign! Email not displaying correctly? == in your browser. Dear Lowcountry Neighbors, Wow! To say I am very excited would be a total understatement. Today, 23 current and former public servants from across South Carolina's First Congressional District endorsed our campaign! The endorsements from the local leaders listed below show that I am the "Lowcountry's Conservative for Congress." I proudly admit that I 'm not the favored candidate of the Washington special interests. Rather, I am the trusted, business-minded conservative unifying Republicans in our district to beat Joe Cunningham. If you are in that number - a Lowcountry Republican committed to beating Joe Cunningham this fall , I ask for your support today. Please join highly respected Lowcountry leaders in support of our campaign like current State Representative, former South Carolina Republican Party First Vice-Chair, and former Charleston County Republican Party chair Lin Bennett, who stressed my principled conservatism in her endorsement: "Kathy Landing is the principled and trusted leader we can always count on to stand for our conservative values, not play politics with them. Kathy Landing will not become complacent with the old Washington guard. Rather, Kathy Landing will work tirelessly and utilize her business experience, financial expertise, and principled conservatism to make government more efficient and effective. " Lin is right - I will always stand for our conservative, Lowcountry values. I will not become enamored by Washington; I want to go to Washington to shake things up! If you want a Member of Congress dedicated to the Lowcountry, not the DC swamp, I humbly ask you to consider helping our efforts. One of the most humbling endorsements received today comes from a leader I have had the pleasure to work alongside for the past three years, Mount Pleasant Mayor Pro-Tempore Tom O'Rourke, who highlighted my diplomacy and professionalism in his endorsement. "The Lowcountry can have no one more prepared, pragmatic, and professional in Congress than Kathy Landing. Kathy Landing has proven time and again her ability to work well with her colleagues including those with differing opinions to achieve real results for our community. Kathy Landing will make us proud in Congress." With three weeks until the Republican Primary, I am truly honored to have earned the endorsements of the following leaders in our community: Former South Carolina First District Congressman Tommy Hartnett (Charleston County) National Journal's Most Conservative Member of Congress in 2011 Randy Neugebauer (Charleston County) Former Congresswoman and Chair of the Republican Study Committee Sue Myrick (Charleston County) State Representative, former SC Republican Party Vice-Chair and former Charleston County Republican Party Chair Lin Bennett Beaufort County Treasurer Maria Wells, CPA Beaufort County Councilman Stu Rodman Charleston County Councilwoman Jenny Costa Honeycutt Charleston County Councilman Herb Sass Dorchester County Councilman Jay Byars Dorchester County Councilman David Chinnis Dorchester County Councilman Bill Hearn Hilton Head Island Mayor Pro-Tempore Bill Harkins Hilton Head Island Councilman Tom Lennox Mount Pleasant Mayor Pro-Tempore Tom O 'Rourke Mount Pleasant Town Councilman Jake Rambo Mount Pleasant Town Councilwoman Brenda Corley Isle of Palms Councilman Randy Bell Isle of Palms Councilman Phillip Pounds Isle of Palms Councilman Rusty Streetman Former Berkeley County School Board Member and former Berkeley County Republican Party Chairman Terry Hardesty Former State Senator and former Charleston County Republican Party Chairman John Kuhn Former Beaufort County Councilwoman Beth Grace First District's South Carolina Commissioner on Higher Education Terrye Campsen Seckinger** I thank them for their trust and support. Thank you for the opportunity to serve as the Lowcountry's voice in Congress. And, thank you in advance for your vote in the June 9th Republican Primary. Please bring all your friends and neighbors or encourage them to vote absentee ballot now. Every vote counts!! On to Victory, | Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " ---|--- | | Kathy Landing for Congress PO Box 31338 Charleston, SC 29417 == |

In case you missed it, I had a conversation with Sean Hannity yesterday about what True the Vote is doing to battle the absolute CHAOS that groups in states across the country like Nevada, Virginia are pushing through vote by mail efforts.

In a multitude of ways, these efforts have _**weakened**_ our electoral system and _**disgraced**_ the rights every American has to make their voice heard.

Friend --

Did you hear the news? **Senator Elizabeth Warren has just _endorsed_ Georgette Gómez for Congress!**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17555371/198367184/1147193815?refcode=em-200519-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQwNjYwOC0zMjlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9CBov7tGNsJwhIvZWPobBEq663XfpRMPl_2oHCoEZC8=) Now more than ever, we need experienced and ethical leaders who will help struggling families and rebuild America with bold new investments in people, public health and jobs. **Senator Warren knows that Georgette has the courage and conviction to fight for big, structural change in Congress.**

This is a game-changer, friend! And right now we need to build on this momentum:

**[Will you chip in a contribution of $3 to help us celebrate this HUGE endorsement? Just like Senator Warren, Georgette won’t take a dime from corporate PACs and we’re depending on grassroots support to bring progressive change to CA-53.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17555372/198367185/1147193815?refcode=em-200519-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQwNjYwOC0zMjlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9CBov7tGNsJwhIvZWPobBEq663XfpRMPl_2oHCoEZC8=)** **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200519-all-2-a)This endorsement is another reminder that Georgette is building a broad and truly historic coalition in this race. **Labor unions, environmental groups, the California Democratic Party, local elected leaders, and leading Democrats like Senator Warren are all unifying behind our campaign.

We’re humbled by the support, but we’re still up against our self-funding opponent’s millions as well as her personal super PAC.

_Because of her massive spending, our opponent was the top vote winner in the March primary election._ Overcoming that in November is going to require overwhelming grassroots energy.

**We need you, friend:[ Join Georgette and Senator Warren in our fight for real progressive change in San Diego. Chip in $3 to help us win in CA-53.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17555373/198367186/1147193815?refcode=em-200519-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQwNjYwOC0zMjlhLWVhMTEtODZlOS0wMDE1NWQwM2I1ZGQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9CBov7tGNsJwhIvZWPobBEq663XfpRMPl_2oHCoEZC8=)**

body:
The countdown is on until our primary election on June 2nd, and the race is picking up! Over here at #TeamScheller, we are doing all we can to spread Peter, The countdown is on until our primary election on June 2nd, and the race is picking up! Over here at #TeamScheller, we are doing all we can to spread the word about Lisa Scheller.
We’re having unprecedented success connecting with voters virtually, answering your questions, and promoting Lisa’s promising plan for a better PA-07, but one thing we’re missing, fname, is your help. But -- today, we’re launching a quick way YOU can help Lisa.
Today we’re launching the Pennsylvania Yard Sign Victory Fund!
The purpose of this victory fund is to ensure that homes all across the Lehigh Valley are covered with yard signs that promote Lisa’s name, but we can’t do that without proper funding.
We must meet a minimum print order of $5,000 in order to get new signs printed, and I’m afraid that with the short amount of time left, we’ll be unable to do this alone. This is where you come into play.
**[Will you please chip in $50 now to ensure that we are able to print as many signs as necessary to let the Valley know that they should vote for Lisa on June name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump sends letter to the World Health Organization
body:
The World Health Organization’s response to Coronavirus has been filled with one misstep and cover-up after another. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70a68d1efd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • May 19, 2020
---
| | |
# **Read President Trump’s letter to the WHO**

**The World Health Organization’s** response to Coronavirus has been filled with one misstep and cover-up after another. American taxpayers send over $400 million to the WHO each year—about 10 times what China gives—for the privilege of watching this UN agency parrot Chinese government claims and put political correctness over saving lives.

**President Trump** halted this funding last month until the WHO’s mismanagement of the pandemic is investigated. In the meantime, the United States is redirecting global health aid to other groups directly engaged in the fight.

**This week,** President Trump sent a letter to Dr. Tedros, Director-General of the WHO, outlining 14 serious concerns raised by America’s review of the agency. Here’s an excerpt:
| | _The World Health Organization has repeatedly made claims about the coronavirus that were either grossly inaccurate or misleading . . . You praised the Chinese government for its "transparency" with respect to the coronavirus, announcing that China had set a "new standard for outbreak control" and "bought the world time." You did not mention that China had, by then, silenced or punished several doctors for speaking out about the virus and restricted Chinese institutions from publishing information about it._ |
---|---|---

[Click here to read President Trump’s full letter.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=201f71ceff&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [Behind the President’s decision to halt WHO funding](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c19775397d&e=3ee4985eea)
|
---
|
## **Farmers to President Trump: ‘You stand behind us’**

**President Trump announced** major action this morning to support America’s farmers, ranchers, and growers during the Coronavirus pandemic and recovery.

**The newly launched** Coronavirus Food Assistance Program, or CFAP, will provide direct relief to American farmers and ranchers who saw significant price declines during the Coronavirus outbreak. Alongside CFAP, the USDA’s Farmers to Families Food Box Program will partner with distributors to purchase $3 billion in fresh produce, dairy, and meat products to help Americans in need.

**“We fought hard** for this,” the President said, standing alongside Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue and Ivanka Trump, who helped launch the initiative.

🎬 [President Trump: Thank you for keeping food on the table!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0fec856ce1&e=3ee4985eea "https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1262772872466087936")

**“Farmers across America** are very appreciative, Mr. President, of what you've done,” American Farm Bureau President [Zippy Duvall said today](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9521ca2c59&e=3ee4985eea). “We appreciate when we're going through difficult times, that you stand behind us.”

**With strong farms** , America’s food supply chain will remain safe and secure as our country reopens. Last month, President Trump used the Defense Production Act to make sure Americans have a reliable supply of beef, pork, and poultry in the months ahead.

🇺🇸 [American agriculture remains the bedrock of our economy!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e6df3ec61&e=3ee4985eea)

**READ: **[“Ivanka Trump pushes food distribution program”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4a1ceb145b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Two Weeks: Primary Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Indiana Republican Party
body:
Indiana's primary election is just two weeks way -- June 2.And with important races up and down the ballot determining our party's nominees in... |
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ec96c9f958&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Dear Indiana Republicans -

Indiana's primary election is just two weeks way -- June 2.

And with important races up and down the ballot determining our party's nominees in November, we want to make sure you have all the information you need to vote -- including one big deadline this Thurday.
* **Voting Absentee By Mail:** If you choose to vote absentee by mail, you must make sure your local county clerk or Board of Elections has received your absentee ballot request by this Thursday.
* **Voting Early In Person:** If you'd prefer to vote early in person, you can do so starting this Tuesday, with early voting running through June 1. Check [IndianaVoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e5dc097146&e=1acd9bb3d6) for your polling location and hours.

If you choose to request an absentee ballot, here's how to make that request online right now:
1. **Go to [IndianaVoters.in.gov](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=452135661a&e=1acd9bb3d6) and click “Vote By Mail or Traveling Board.”**
2. ** Click “Visit My Voter Portal,” and securely log in with your name, date of birth and county.**
3. **On the left navigation bar, select “Absentee Voting,” and then click “Vote By Mail.”**
4. **Complete the “Application for Absentee Ballot by Mail Only For 2020 Primary Election” form. Select a Republican ballot.**
5. **Check that you authorize your signature to be added to the application, and the click “Submit Application.”**
6. ** You will get your absentee ballot in the mail.**
7. ** Fill out the ballot and return it to your county election division.**

But regardless of whether you vote absentee, early or on Primary Day -- it's most important that your voice is heard! Together, let's elect nominate strong Republican leaders this primary -- and build the momentum we'll need to win up and down the ballot in November! [**\-- > Click Here for More Primary Election Updates <\--**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5ca27de5aa&e=1acd9bb3d6)
#INThisTogether,
\- Your Indiana Republican Team

---
| | | | | | | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6111fbd923&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

| | [](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2b3d941fdd&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

Indianapolis, IN 46204

Paid for by Indiana Republican Party Authorized by Indiana Republican Party.

name: John Philip Sousa IV
subject: Rush supports him, so should you...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, I hope that you are well and staying safe during this uncertain time for our nation... * |
Dear Peter, The Democrats are using the coronavirus to screw up the November elections, defeat President Trump, and guarantee that principled conservative candidates like Rush-endorsed John James goes down in flames alongside him. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=ERBuGzy&) [Please read my email below and send your support today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EBIiyM0&) Together, we will come through this virus pandemic as well as secure Donald Trump's and other conservatives victory this November! _Urgently,_ \- John
---|---

* * *
| | _You're receiving this email because you're committed to defending America against rabid liberals hell-bent on destroying our values. If you're giving up on this critical fight, please [UNSUBSCRIBE](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=N0425&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=Ehv4Iyb&)_
---
|
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, First, I hope that you are well and staying safe during this uncertain time for our nation. And secondly, thank you. Because of your support, our _Faces of America_ spokespeople have been on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, New Mexico and Pennsylvania since August. It is also thanks to your support that three months ago we were able to expand and launch ads into:
* **_Michigan_** \- One supporting Black Republican SUPERSTAR John James for Senate and another opposing radical Rep. Rashida Tlaib
* **_Minnesota_** \- To defeat America-hating extremist Ilhan Omar

John James has a good chance of defeating tax and spend, pro-abortion Senator Gary Peters and Rush Limbaugh gives John James a big thumbs up...
* * *
| | "John James is what everyone would hope and pray for in a son. He is what everyone would hope for in a son-in-law and what everybody would hope for in a senator. He is a guy who grew up amazingly believing in the American dream and has lived it. He personifies it."
---
\- Rush Limbaugh
* * *
As the nation is focused on the possible financial impact and death toll due to the coronavirus, the Left continues to place blame on President Trump, not only for the outbreak of the virus itself, but for sky-rocketing unemployment and the sputtering economy.
**We all know that the coronavirus is not President Trump's fault. The blame falls solely on China.**
**More than anything, China wants to be number one in the world from an economic and a military standpoint.**
**But President Trump started getting in the way of their goal...**
When President Trump looked at all the trade agreements with China and he said "time out." And much to the chagrin of China loving Liberals in America, President Trump imposed hefty tariffs on many of the goods China imports to the United States.
They retaliated and so did President Trump which caused so much damage to their economy that they agreed to a trade agreement with the US.
But then China declared war on the world...
No shots were fired, but as of right now there is over 250,000 deaths including more than 70,000 in the U.S.
All evidence in investigations of the origin of the deadly coronavirus points to two laboratories in Wuhan, China.
Just as the terrorists did on 9-11 they have managed to shut down our economy and in all probability change the way we live our lives forever.
And they hid the severity of the virus from the entire world.
They locked down all travel from the Wuhan area but allowed infected people to travel all over the world bringing the virus to 184 different countries, sending thousands to the hospital, hundreds of thousands to the morgues, millions into quarantine and shutting down world economies.
**Democrats need to place blame where blame is due, hold China accountable and stop attacking President Trump!**
But that's just not going to happen...
President Trump has been in battle after battle with the Democrats and it has just gotten tougher. Now that Joe Biden is the "chosen one," millions of dollars from the Democratic National Committee, Michael Bloomberg and leftist, radical liberal Fat Cats will be pouring into his campaign.
Unfortunately, polls show Joe Biden with a slight lead over President Trump. And though this poll was conducted before the allegations of sexual harassment/assault by Biden's former staffer Tara Reade, **it's not good news**.
But a recent _Latino Decisions_ poll reveals a weak spot for Joe Biden and that weak spot is with Hispanic Americans. This is a huge concern for Democrats. They know if they lose the Hispanic vote, and more votes from other minorities, Biden will lose.
**We plan to use this new information to our advantage and expand and increase our ads in Hispanic markets.**
And worse than "Sleepy Joe" becoming our next President? His running mate selection.
He already vowed that his running mate would be a woman, and now some of the names floating around for consideration are socialists like Elizabeth Warren and Kamala Harris and Liberals like Stacey Abrams and...
**...HILLARY CLINTON!**
Can you imagine the irreparable damage that Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton (or Elizabeth Warren or Kamala Harris) would inflict on our country?! **And worse, what if Joe Biden can't serve and one of these left-wing radicals becomes President?**
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EyXiGhE&)
We **MUST** fight tooth and nail to make sure that does not happen!
We **MUST** stay on the air in Alabama, California, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota, New Mexico and Pennsylvania, increase our ads in Hispanic markets and expand into the states where data shows the Democrat is vulnerable.
We **MUST** continue to be laser-focused making sure minorities hear the truth about President Trump and Republicans.
Not only is that important for President Trump to defeat Joe Biden, but if we can defeat 18 Democrats in November, **Republicans will take back the House and Nancy Pelosi will be dethroned as Speaker**!
And we have the plan to do just that...
We've proven that our "Nadler Method" outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years.
"Our efforts to expand the [black] electorate were made more difficult by [their] black radio strategy... Republican messaging to the base will make base voter continuity, not to mention expansion, very difficult for Democrats."

\- Democrat Donna Brazile
Former Chairwoman of the Democratic National Committee
---
"Never-Trumpers" are blaming President Trump for the coronavirus pandemic to make sure that he does not win re-election...
**That's because, before the COVID-19 outbreak, polls showed that instead of losing support, President Trump was gaining support among minorities, Peter!**
**That's why it's imperative that we stay on the air in support of President Trump and to make sure minority voters hear the truth about the lies that the Democrats have been feeding them for decades.**
We must stay on the air and expand into the states where President Trump needs the most help (and can win) and defeat some of the most radical, socialist political incumbents.
We have paid for our radio time through May and now working to raise **$43,800** a month for June, July and August. That is just the bare minimum we need. If we raise more we'll buy more ads.
The battle for America continues, and with you by our side, we will prevail. **All we have to do is syphon off a few percentages of the minority votes from the Democrats and they will lose!**
**WE MUST FIGHT** together on behalf of President Trump's re-election and reverse the Left's march toward Socialism...
**We've come so far in four years, having another four is imperative.**
[Please RENEW your support today by sending a most generous gift of $20.20, $35, $75, $150 or more today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMbYJQA&)
But if that is just too much for you right now, please know that any amount you feel comfortable sending is critically needed.
If you live by a monthly budget, Peter, I've set up the ability for us to process monthly recurring donations which will help greatly in our budgeting as we move forward. All you have to do is check the monthly option on the donation page, enter the amount you wish to donate monthly, and your gift will be processed around the same time every month until after the election.
There's a lot of work to do, but together, we can dispel the Liberals' Lies and take our America back.
[I trust you will do what you can.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=Ey3ThqN&)
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. Peter, it's an honor to fight alongside you on behalf of our great Country to reverse the Left's march toward Socialism. [Your support keeps us going!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMjoCFi&)
I'll be sending you more information and updating you regularly on our activities and election news. In the meantime, stay safe. Stay well. Please don't hesitate to contact me if you have any questions.

Stars & Stripes Forever PAC (C) 2020\. All rights reserved.
_Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee._
National Headquarters | P.O. Box 1351 | Merrifield, VA 22116-1351
[www.StarsAndStripesForeverPAC.org](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SwQWtV&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9DwI9r&)
---

| Stars & Stripes Forever PAC, PO Box 1351, 22116, Merrifield, United States
---
You may [unsubscribe](https://app.getresponse.com/unsubscribe.html?x=a62b&m=N0425&mc=JU&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMUdGOE&pt=unsubscribe) or [change your contact details](https://app.getresponse.com/change_details.html?x=a62b&m=N0425&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=E9WEt0S&pt=change_details) at any time.
[ ](https://app.getresponse.com/referral.html?x=a62b&c=ytWvg&u=z93TV&z=EwcjG2q&)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: JUST IN: California launches fund for illegal immigrants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
California just announced a $75 million fund to provide financial assistance to illegal immigrants. That means your tax dollars are going directly to support individuals who are in our country illegally. It's outrageous. We know that California is a hotbed of failed liberal policies, but this new illegal immigrant giveaway comes at a time when they are DEMANDING that the rest of us give them a $50 billion bailout.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42537930&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1Mzc5MzAS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1Mzc5MzAS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

California just announced a $75 million fund to provide financial assistance to illegal immigrants. _That means your tax dollars are going directly to support individuals who are in our country illegally._

_**It 's outrageous.**_

We know that California is a hotbed of failed liberal policies, but this new illegal immigrant giveaway comes at a time when they are DEMANDING that the rest of us give them a $50 billion bailout. What kind of incentive will this send to foreigners who are considering coming here illegally?

And to make it worse, Democrats are holding police officers and firefighters hostage if they don't get their bailout

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1Mzc5MzAS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

**I say enough is enough: we shouldn 't send a dime to bailout California while they are handing out cash to illegal immigrants.**

[**Sign my petition: no bailout for states that give away taxpayer dollars to illegal immigrants**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1Mzc5MzAS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

All Americans should be outraged that California is prioritizing cash payments to illegal immigrants over the public safety needs of its citizens.

As unemployment grows due to the China virus, we must be vigilant and ensure that taxpayer dollars are spent wisely.

California's budget was a mess before the pandemic due to decades of failed liberal policies.

_**But handing out cash to illegal immigrants while police officers are being threatened with furloughs is a new low even for California.**_

**[Sign my petition: no bailout for states that give away taxpayer dollars to illegal immigrants](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1Mzc5MzAS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Let's show California we will not stand for these radical liberal policies.

In service,

Tom
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI1Mzc5MzAS1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc2MTg2Nzc0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Little Rock, AR 72202

subject: Did you see this poll for Nov?

body:
| []()
---

| | | **POLL ALERT FOR NOVEMBER REMATCH

Christy Smith: 48%
Mike Garcia: 46%

LET'S TURN THIS SEAT BLUE
CHIP IN NOW >> ** [DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bba8/29776869/9850a3d/569f2075/3591274358/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA1MTlfcGl2b3QzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2005_email_christy?refcode=em20_200519_pivot3-full")

Peter --

We need to act quickly to build up our support NOW so that we are in the best position to win what will be a very tight election this fall.

Mike Garcia will soon have a voting record that shows him standing by Donald Trump, not by his constituents. With way more voters turning out we have a much better chance to win this seat than we did in the special election.

**[Can you chip in $5 or anything you can RIGHT NOW so we can scale up our campaign operation quickly?
